1550000056.english: Huh? Beta... what are you doing here?

1550000058.english: Oh my goodness... why is your face so damaged?
1550000058.korean: 세상에… 얼굴은 또 왜 이렇게 많이 상하셨어요?

1550000060.english: Oh, right... I shouldn't be doing this. Just a moment, shall I have my younger siblings bring out some flower tea?&nHeh heh... Seeing those dark circles reminded me of a flower that helps with good sleep, but...
1550000060.korean: 아, 참… 이럴 게 아니지. 잠깐만요, 동생들 시켜서 꽃 차라도 내올까요?&n후훗... 다크서클을 보니까 숙면에 도움이 되는 꽃이 떠올랐는데...

1550000062.english: Hey, Beta. This is the first time I've visited the Fairy Garden since coming to Orca... please give me a chance to treat you to something. I'll get it right away, just a moment.
1550000062.korean: 에이, 베타. 오르카에 오신 뒤로 처음 들른 페어리 정원인데… 뭔가 대접해 드릴 기회를 주세요. 바로 가져올게요, 잠깐만요.

1550000067.english: Ms. Leah... just offered me flower tea...
1550000067.korean: 레아 님은… 방금 저한테 꽃 차를 내주신다고…

1550000068.english: You, get out of the way right now.

1550000069.english: Yes, yes what?! Now, wait a minute... Suddenly, why are you doing that...?
1550000069.korean: 네, 네엣?! 자, 잠깐… 갑자기, 왜, 그러시는…

1550000071.english: It's a flower Leah loves and cherishes... I was going to crush it.
1550000071.korean: 레아가 좋아하고 아끼는 꽃인데... 깔고 뭉게려 했어.

1550000073.english: Get your butt out of the way.

1550000076.english: Alpha? Weren't you on vacation? Come in...
1550000076.korean: 알파? 휴가 중 아니었어? 들어 와…

1560000003.english: I'm sorry. I made another mistake...

1560000004.english: ...Next time, you don't have to do it.

1560000005.english: Thank you for understanding... Thank you...

1560000008.english: You look down... It doesn't belong in the Queen's flower garden.
1560000008.korean: 표정이 어둡네... 여왕의 꽃밭에는 안 어울려.

1560000011.english: ...there isn't any. It's just... I'm feeling that way. Just... in various ways.

1560000015.english: Huh? Sometimes I feel... What do you mean by "not good"?
1560000015.korean: 네? 가끔 기분이... 안 좋다는 게 무슨 말씀이세요?

1560000016.english: The Queen... she's always in a bad mood whenever she sees Leia.
1560000016.korean: 여왕은… 레아 볼 때마다 맨날 기분이 나빠.

1560000017.english: Huh? I'm not quite sure what you mean...&nAs far as I remember, I always thought Titania and Rhea were twin sisters...
1560000017.korean: 네? 무슨 말씀인지 잘 모르겠는데요…&n제가 전부터 기억하기론 티타니아 님과 레아 님은 쌍둥이 자매라고 알았는데…

1560000018.english: The Queen is consumed by the feeling that Leia is a failure.

1560000020.english: The queen was originally designed to hate Leah on sight.&nShe's not a bad kid, but the queen just gets angry for no reason when she sees Leah...
1560000020.korean: 여왕은 원래부터 레아를 보면 증오를 갖게 설계됐어.&n나쁜 애가 아닌데… 레아 보면 여왕은 이유 없이 화가 나…

1560000021.english: ...I see. That's the first time I've heard that.&nHaa... Come to think of it, our secretary lemonades were designed similarly, weren't they?"
1560000021.korean: …그렇군요. 처음 안 사실이네요.&n하아… 그러고보니, 저희 비서 레모네이드들도 비슷하게 설계가 되었죠.

1560000023.english: ...Not hatred like Titania-sama's, but a workaround code... sigh, this is getting long.&nI just started receiving orders, constantly churned out by someone. Endlessly... very endlessly..."
1560000023.korean: …티타니아 님처럼 증오는 아니지만, 우회 코드… 하아, 설명이 길어지네요.&n그냥, 누군가에 의해 끊임없이 양산하는 명령을 받게 되었어요. 끝없이… 아주 끝없이…

1560000024.english: Queen, I don't really know about that.

1560000025.english: ...Haha. I don't know either. If it weren't for Master now... my life would have ended with me creating my own clone.&nWithout even knowing why I had to make it, I would have just kept endlessly... endlessly... doing meaningless work...
1560000025.korean: …하하. 저도 모르겠어요. 지금 주인님이 아니었다면… 저도 제 클론을 만들다 끝날 인생이었어요.&n왜 만들어야 하는지도 모른 채, 끝없이 계속… 계속… 무의미한 작업만 했을… 거예요.

1560000026.english: You can't change what humans have made.
1560000026.korean: 인간이 그렇게 만든 건 바꿀 수 없잖아.

1560000027.english: Still, the curse ended after Master became the chairman of Caracas.&nTo express my gratitude, I'm trying my best to serve my master diligently... but it's harder than I thought.
1560000027.korean: 그래도 주인님께서 카라카스 회장님으로 오르시고 나선 이 저주가 막을 내렸죠.&n감사한 마음을 대신해 주인님을 열심히 보필하려 하는데… 생각보다 많이 힘드네요.

1560000028.english: Sometimes I think about what happened in Caracas. Always a failure... the weakest... for some reason, I'm the one taking all the blame and getting yelled at by the clones...
1560000028.korean: 카라카스 일이 떠오를 때가 있어요. 툭하면 실패작이다… 제일 약하다… 어째서인지 클론들한테 독박으로 욕받이가 돼서…

1560000030.english: The father I once served... no, Lord Simon, treated me like a disposable tool...
1560000030.korean: 제가 한때 섬겼던 아버지… 아니, 시몬 님은 절 소모품으로 취급하셨고…

1560000031.english: The queen is also forced to remember that she's always a failure.&nI wonder why I'm like this... But what changed that queen was..."
1560000031.korean: 여왕도 늘 실패작이라 강제로 떠올려.&n난 왜이럴까 싶어… 그런데 그런 여왕을 바꾼 건…

1560000035.english: Oh my goodness! Would you like to have tea and chat, like Titania?&nHmph... This is the first time I've seen Titania talk to someone for so long like this?"
1560000035.korean: 어머나~ 티타니아 같이 차 마시면서 이야기 할래요? &n후훗… 이렇게 오랫동안 티타니아가 누구랑 얘기한 건 처음이네요?

1560000037.english: Titania~ I can see your face is all red! I told you to eat it quickly, didn't I? You're shy, aren't you?
1560000037.korean: 티타니아~ 얼굴 다 빨개진 거 다 보여요! 얼른 드시라니까요? 부끄러워하긴...

1560000039.english: Oh, you just haven't seen Titania truly angry, Beta.&nThat one is in a very docile state, isn't it? No... should I say I'm shy? Hehe...
1560000039.korean: 에이~ 티타니아가 진심으로 화난 걸 못 봐서 그래요, 베타.&n저건 엄청 온순한 상태인걸요? 아니… 부끄러움 탄다고 해야 하나? 헤헤…

1560000040.english: Ms. Leah. When you say twin sisters, are they... clones, exactly?
1560000040.korean: 레아 님. 쌍둥이 자매라고 하면, 정확히는… 클론인가요?

1560000041.english: Hmm... it's a bit complicated. Our genetic lineage is the same, but... I was a success, while Titania was closer to a failure.&nTo force her output to increase, should I say they deliberately instilled the emotion of hatred in Titania...?"
1560000041.korean: 음… 좀 복잡해요. 유전계통은 같지만… 저는 성공작이었고, 티타니아는 실패작에 가까웠어요.&n출력을 강제로 높이기 위해서 티타니아한텐 증오라는 감정을 일부러 심어놨다고 해야 하나…?

1560000043.english: Come to think of it, this is the first time Titania has had a long conversation with someone other than the commander.&nHe always looked so vulnerable, thrashing in nightmares that seemed to hate me... you know."
1560000043.korean: 그러고보니, 티타니아가 사령관님 말고도 오래 대화한 사람은 처음이네요.&n늘 절 증오하는 악몽 속에 허우적거리는 모습이 위태로워 보였는데… 말이죠.

1560000044.english: Okay... I'll definitely pay you back this debt later.
1560000044.korean: 앞으로도 티타니아랑 같이 사이좋게 지내주시면 안 될까요?

1560000045.english: The clothes are finished, but they haven't come to pick them up. Do I have to go in person?
1560000045.korean: 옷은 완성이 됐는데… 찾으러 오질 않네. 직접 가야 하나?

1560000047.english: Oh my gosh...! Titania... what brings you here?

1560000048.english: Can't the Queen come to look at clothes?
1560000048.korean: 여왕은 옷 보러 오면 안 돼?

1560000049.english: That's not possible... Hmm, do you need a lot of time to look around? The commander who placed the order seems busy...&nMy older sisters ran off to slack off, so I guess I'll have to deliver this outfit.
1560000049.korean: 그럴 리 가요… 흐음, 구경에 필요한 시간이 많이 필요하신가요? 발주한 사령관은 바쁜 것 같고…&n언니들은 농땡이 피우러 도망가 버려서… 아무래도 제가 이 옷을 전달해 줘야 할 것 같은데.

1560000051.english: Yes, this outfit... it's the one I'm going to give to Beta.
1560000051.korean: 네, 이 옷… 베타한테 전해줄 옷이거든요.

1560000052.english: If it's Beta... isn't that the gloomy-looking woman in black?
1560000052.korean: 베타라면… 그 음침하게 생긴… 검은 차림의 여자 아냐?

1560000053.english: Yes, that's right. Anyway... why is Titania suddenly interested in someone else? ... That's unexpected.
1560000053.korean: 네, 맞아요. 그나저나… 갑자기 티타니아가 다른 분께 관심을 가지시네요? ...의외인데요?

1560000055.english: Fufut… is that so? Then instead of me, will you deliver this outfit to Beta?
1560000055.korean: 후훗… 그렇군요? 그렇다면 절 대신해서 이 옷을 베타한테 전해주시고 오실래요?

1560000056.english: You're making the queen... run errands?

1560000057.english: Only if you're interested, of course. Since you seem to be close, I asked, but are you going to refuse?
1560000057.korean: 어디까지나 흥미가 생기신다면 말이죠. 친한 사이신 것 같아서 부탁해 봤는데, 거절하시려나요?

1560000059.english: I can't sleep... I'm tired, but why does this happen every time I lie down...?
1560000059.korean: 잠이… 안 와. 피곤한데… 왜 눕기만 하면 이런 일이 일어나는 걸까요…?

1560000061.english: ... Alpha, sister. I'm sorry, I'm not feeling well and I think I need to rest more...
1560000061.korean: ...알파 언니. 죄송해요, 몸이 안 좋아서 더 쉬어야 할 것 같아…

1560000065.english: ...the queen isn't an express train. Take this.

1560000067.english: The clothes he gave you as a gift.

1560000068.english: The commander... the clothes he gave me as a gift? But, I don't think the clothes Audrey made are something I can pull off.
1560000068.korean: 사령관님이… 선물한 옷이요? 근데, 오드리 님이 만드신 옷은 제가 소화할 수 있는 옷이 아닐 것 같은데.

1560000069.english: You haven't even tried it on.

1560000070.english: ...it won't suit you. Even if it's just to not let Audrey's hard work go to waste... This outfit would suit someone else better than me.
1560000070.korean: …안 어울릴 거예요. 오드리 님의 수고를 헛되게 하지 않기 위해서라도... 이 옷은 제가 아닌 다른 분이 입는 게 더 어울릴 거예요.

1560000072.english: For example... Lady Titania, or something like that...

1560000075.english: The Queen knows. He likes this kind of thing. So, put it on.
1560000075.korean: 여왕이 아는데. 걔… 이런 거 좋아해. 그러니까 입어.

1560000079.english: As expected... it's not that great, right? These clothes would suit Titania much better.
1560000079.korean: 역시… 좀 별로죠? 이런 옷은 티타니아 님이 훨씬 더 어울릴 거예요.

1560000081.english: I'm already looking haggard... isn't it a bit much? Ugh... I'm not feeling well at all...
1560000081.korean: 가뜩이나 초췌한데… 별로지 않아요?  하아… 으으… 영 몸상태도 안 좋고…

1560000083.korean: 어... 이 보온병에 담긴 건 뭐예요?

1560000084.english: Pomegranate tea. Drinking it will make you feel better. Because the Queen used to drink it often.
1560000084.korean: 석류차. 마시면 마음이 편해질 거야. 여왕이 자주 마시던 거니까.

1560000086.english: This is the plant Leah told the queen to raise.&nSince I was harvesting the fruit, I decided to make it into tea.
1560000086.korean: 레아가 여왕한테 키워보라고 한 식물이야. &n열매 수확하는 김에 차로 만들어 봤어.

1560000088.english: Do you know the flower language of the pomegranate tree?

1560000089.english: Could you tell me what it is?

1560000091.english: Mature beauty... that's a flower language that doesn't suit me at all.
1560000091.korean: 원숙한 아름다움… 저하곤 전혀 안 어울리는 꽃말이네요.

1560000092.english: It suits you. The clothes you're wearing now are something anyone can't pull off.&n...they'll absolutely love it.
1560000092.korean: 어울려. 지금 입은 옷은 아무나 소화 못하는 옷이잖아.&n…걔, 엄청 좋아할 거야.

1560000093.english: ...Is that really true? Titania, you're not just praising me for no reason, are you?
1560000093.korean: …정말 그럴까요? 티타니아 님이 저한테 괜히 칭찬해 주시는 건 아니고요?

1560000094.english: He likes weird stuff. For example, reverse bunny.&nBut, Your Majesty... I have a question I'd like to ask.
1560000094.korean: 걔 이상한 거 좋아해. 이를 테면 역바니,라던가.&n근데, 여왕… 하나 묻고 싶은 거 있어.

1560000095.english: Huh? What would you like to ask?

1560000096.english: Why do you give up so easily, starting with the assumption that you won't succeed?&nDon't do anything stupid.
1560000096.korean: 왜 넌 안 될 거라 생각부터 하고 쉽게 포기해?&n바보 같은 짓 하지 마.

1560000098.english: The Queen knows what you're thinking... I don't know.&nBut even when facing the Queen's Storm head-on, he kept approaching silently until the very end.
1560000098.korean: 네가 무슨 생각하는지 여왕은... 몰라. &n근데 걔는 여왕 폭풍을 정면으로 맞을 때도 끝까지 묵묵히 다가왔어.

1560000100.english: The term "failure" is something humans arbitrarily assign, but... The queen isn't a failure.&nBecause he once told the Queen that she definitely wasn't.
1560000100.korean: 실패작은 인간이 멋대로 붙인 거지만... 여왕은 실패작이 아니야.&n언젠가 걔가 절대 아니라고 여왕한테 말했었으니까.

1560000101.english: Thinking that way, the Queen... it makes me feel better.

1560000102.english: But does it make you feel better to torment yourself like that?&nQueen, I'm leaving, so drink that and go find him.
1560000102.korean: 그런데 넌 그렇게 혼자 자학하면 편해?&n여왕, 갈 거니까 그거 마시고 걔 찾아가.

1560000103.english: ...Lady Titania. Actually, when I was wearing this outfit... It was just a moment, but I felt like I had become someone else.
1560000103.korean: …티타니아 님. 사실 이 옷을 입었을 땐 말이죠. 순간이었지만 제가… 다른 사람이 된 기분이었어요.

1560000104.english: As soon as I opened my eyes, I even had the audacious thought of being held by my master and wearing a happy expression.
1560000104.korean: 눈을 뜨자마자, 제가 주인님께 안겨서 행복한 표정을 짓는, 그런 발칙한 상상까지 했어요.

1560000105.english: And then I realized, oh... my master cares about me. I was still stuck in the past...&nMy master is truly consistently warm, not treating me like a disposable item... You are my master.
1560000105.korean: 그리고 깨달았어요, 아… 주인님은 날 아끼시구나. 난 여전히 과거에 얽매여 있었구나...&n주인님은 날 소모품 취급하지 않는, 정말이지 한결같이 따뜻한... 나의 주인님이시구나.

1560000106.english: You are Master to whom I shall offer my loyalty and love...

1560000107.english: I suddenly got scared. You were already getting depressed on your own and sulking like a child, weren't you?
1560000107.korean: 덜컥 무서워졌어요. 이미 혼자 멋대로 우울해져서는 어린아이처럼 토라져있었잖아요.

1560000108.english: I wonder if my master will get tired of me like this, or if they'll abandon me like the invited beta... I'm scared...
1560000108.korean: 주인님께서 이런 절 질려하실까, 초대 베타 님처럼 버리실까... 무서워요…

1560000109.english: But, being selfish... even while thinking this way, I keep... I miss you a lot, Master...
1560000109.korean: 그런데, 이기적인 건… 이런 생각을 하면서도, 계속해서... 주인님이 많이… 보고싶어요…

1570000002.english: The Queen even went to the trouble of delivering Beta's clothes... What are you doing sitting here?
1570000002.korean: 여왕이 귀찮게 베타 옷 배달까지 했는데... 여기 앉아서 뭐하는 거야?

1570000003.english: - Oh yeah, I was going to go visit Beta and give her a gift on the date Audrey told me about... but I got so busy with work that I completely forgot.
1570000003.korean: - 그랬었지, 오드리가 말해준 날짜에 찾아 베타한테 선물하려 했었는데… 업무가 많다 보니 그만 새카맣게 잊고 있었다.

1570000004.english: That woman, the beta. Are you a failure just like me?
1570000004.korean: 그 베타라는 여자. 나랑 같은 실패작인 거야?

1570000005.english: - Lost in thought for a moment, I recalled Beta's past, and soon the day I first met her vaguely flashed before my eyes.
1570000005.korean: - 잠시 생각에 잠긴 나는 베타의 과거를 떠올렸다, 이내 어렴풋 그녀를 처음 마주한 날이 스쳐간다.

1570000007.english: - While we don't know the details of how Beta endured those hardships...&nSeeing Beta's first appearance when we met in mourning clothes, my first feeling wasn't gloomy or gloomy, but rather a sense of pity.
1570000007.korean: - 베타가 그동안 그런 수난을 어떻게 받아들였는지 자세한 내막은 알 수 없지만…&n상복을 입고 만난 베타의 첫모습을 보면서 우중충하고 음침하기보단, 안타까운 느낌이 가장 먼저 들었다.

1570000008.english: - The past in Caracas, the actions of herself and her clones, and the worn mourning clothes she wears to atone for them...
1570000008.korean: - 자신과 자신의 클론들이 벌인 카라카스의 지난 날, 그리고 그것들을 속죄하기 위해 입은 낡은 상복…

1570000009.english: - The reason I asked Beta to make me flashy clothes was ultimately because I wanted to convey my inner desire to break free from the constraints that bound me.
1570000009.korean: - 베타에게 화려한 옷을 만들어달라 부탁했던 이유도, 결국은 스스로를 얽맨 속박에서 풀려나길 바라는 속마음을 전하고 싶었기 때문이다.

1570000011.english: Yes... I kissed him. But it was annoying that she wouldn't listen to the queen and just cried on her own.
1570000011.korean: 예… 뻤다고. 하지만 여왕 말 안 듣고 혼자 엉엉 우는 건 짜증났어.

1570000012.english: So, go and soothe them, or do something, anything.&nDoes the Queen have to do all this too?
1570000012.korean: 그니까 가서 달래주고 오든, 뭘 하든 좀 하라고.&n여왕이 이런 거까지 해줘야 해?

1570000013.english: - I've heard from the fairy members that Titania has become quite hostile lately...
1570000013.korean: - 요즘 티타니아가 많이 유해졌단 이야기는 페어리 대원들을 통해 들었지만…

1570000014.english: Why are you laughing? You... do you think the Queen is a joke?
1570000014.korean: 왜 웃는 거야? 너… 여왕이 우스워?

1570000015.english: - As I kicked my chair and stood up, a subtle smile, almost imperceptible to anyone else, played on Titania's lips.
1570000015.korean: - 내가 의자를 박차고 일어서자 티타니아의 입가엔 타인이라면 알아 채기 어려운 오묘한 미소가 그려졌다.

1570000016.english: - After walking down the hallway, I stood in front of Beta's room, taking a deep breath.&nJust as I was about to knock, a faint groan somehow drifted from behind the door.
1570000016.korean: - 복도를 지나, 베타의 방 앞에선 나는 심호흡을 한 채 섰다.&n노크를 하려는 순간, 문 너머로 어째 선가 미약한 신음 소리가 흘러나왔다.

1570000017.english: - Alpha is worried that Beta is locked in their room, not eating anything, and not coming out.
1570000017.korean: - 베타가 방에 틀어박혀 뭘 먹거나, 나오지도 않고 있다는 알파의 걱정...

1570000018.english: - I broke out in a cold sweat, fearing that the beta's body might have weakened and she had contracted some unknown, serious illness. I quickly opened the door and shouted.
1570000018.korean: - 혹시라도 베타의 몸이 약해져 이름 모를 위중한 병이라도 걸렸나 싶어 식은땀이 흘렀고 나는 황급히 문을 열고 소리쳤다.

1570000020.english: - The groaning is definitely real. ...Of course, to be precise, she wasn't exactly 'suffering from an illness,' but rather a beta diligently 'pleasing herself' with her hands tucked under her thighs...
1570000020.korean: - 앓는 소리가 확실하다. …물론 정확히는 '병으로 앓고 있기'보단 자신의 두 허벅지 아래 손을 껴놓은 채 열심히 '자기 위로'를 하는 베타였지만…

1570000021.english: ...Hah, haaah... Heup... Haaah... Ju, Ju-i, Master...?!
1570000021.korean: …하, 하아… 흐읍… 하아… 주, 주이, 주인니임…?!

1570000022.english: - Beta quickly covered her exposed body with the blanket to hide herself.&nSeeing her legs trembling, I somehow found it cute and sat on her bed.
1570000022.korean: - 베타는 자신의 모습을 감추기 위해 황급히 이불로 드러난 몸을 덮었다.&n발발 떨리는 다리를 보자 어쩐지 귀여워져 그녀의 침대에 앉았다.

1570000023.english: - Finally, Beta peeked out, just showing her eyes, and looked up at me.
1570000023.korean: - 이윽고 베타는 빼꼼, 눈만 내민 채 나를 올려다보았다.

1570000024.english: Um... I look pretty pathetic, don't I? Sin, I'm sorry, Master... I was just... so lonely...
1570000024.korean: 저… 많이 추했죠? 죄, 죄송해요 주인님… 너무… 너무 외로워서…

1570000025.english: - Gazing intently into Beta's eyes, I slowly approached her and gently pulled down the blanket.
1570000025.korean: - 베타의 눈을 지긋이 바라보던 난 천천히, 베타에게 다가간 뒤 이불을 스르륵 내렸다.

1570000026.english: Beta stubbornly held onto the edge of the blanket and tried to resist, but eventually, as if surrendering, she bowed her head deeply and explained the whole story to me.
1570000026.korean: 베타는 한사코 이불자락에 힘을 주고 버티려 했지만, 결국 항복하듯 고개를 푹 숙이고 내게 자초지종을 설명했다.

1570000027.english: Master... I'm sorry for overstepping and eavesdropping on the conversation between you and Audrey, and for misunderstanding it on my own.
1570000027.korean: 주인님… 제가 주제넘게 오드리 님과 주인님이 주고받으신 대화를 엿듣고 멋대로 오해해서 죄송해요.

1570000028.english: - Perhaps Beta interpreted the conversation Audrey and I had in a slightly negative way.
1570000028.korean: - 아마도 베타는 나와 오드리가 했던 이야기를, 조금 안 좋은 쪽으로 해석해 들었나 보다.

1570000029.english: - I just wanted to give the beta a beautiful outfit as a joining gift, but...&nEmbarrassed myself, I also hugged her, as if comforting a child.
1570000029.korean: - 난 그저 베타한테 아름다운 옷을 합류 선물로 주고 싶었을 뿐이었는데…&n머쓱해진 나도 그녀를 어린아이 다독이듯 끌어안았다.

1570000030.english: Master... am I perhaps unsightly? Don't you find it unpleasant to look at?
1570000030.korean: 주인님… 저 혹시 흉하지 않나요? 보기 싫진 않으세요?

1570000031.english: - I clasped the beta's wet hands tightly, interlocking our fingers.&nBeta avoided my gaze, but I didn't care.
1570000031.korean: - 나는 베타의 물기 젖은 두 손을 깍지 끼고 꼭 맞잡았다. &n베타는 나의 시선을 피했지만 나는 아랑곳하지 않았다.

1570000033.english: Thank you. However, I... Even if I learn things like this, I don't know if my master will like someone like me.
1570000033.korean: 고마워요. 하지만, 저... 이런 걸 배워도 주인님께서 저 같은 걸 좋아하실지 모르겠어요.

1570000034.english: Who would like a woman who can't take care of herself, is gloomy, and has a belly like this?
1570000034.korean: 자기관리도 못하고, 음침하고, 이렇게 배까지 나온 여자를… 누가 좋아하겠어요?

1570000035.english: Such a dazzling and beautiful appearance would suit others better than me.
1570000035.korean: 그렇게 황홀하고 아름다운 모습은, 제가 아닌 다른 분들이 더 어울릴 거예요.

1570000036.english: It's only right that you should be a gift for someone else, not me...
1570000036.korean: 주인님은 제가 아닌, 다른 누군가의 선물이 되어야 하는 게 마땅하죠…

1570000037.english: - Hearing the hesitant voice of the beta, I carefully brushed her long hair back and kissed her forehead.
1570000037.korean: - 자신없는 베타의 목소리에 나는 그녀의 긴머리를 정성스레 쓸어준 뒤 이마에 키스했다.

1570000038.english: - Without a word, I just stared intently at Beta, and only then did she begin to sob, wiping her tears with the back of her hand.
1570000038.korean: - 아무런 대답 없이 그저 베타를 빤히 바라보자, 그제야 그녀는 눈물을 손등으로 훔치며 울먹거리기 시작했다.

1570000039.english: S-sob... sorry. I let my thoughts wander too much…
1570000039.korean: 흐윽, 죄송해요. 제가 너무 괜한 생각을…

1570000040.english: - And so, for a long time, I held her close and comforted her until she stopped crying.&nFinally, Beta stopped crying and looked up at me, offering a faint smile.
1570000040.korean: - 그렇게 한참을 베타가 우는 것을 멈출 때까지 꼭 끌어안고 다독여주었다.&n이윽고 울음을 그친 베타가 나를 올려다보며 살풋 미소를 내비쳤다.

1570000041.english: ...I thought only dazzling people were around the previous master.
1570000041.korean: …전 주인님의 주변에는 눈부신 분들만 계신 줄 알았어요.

1570000042.english: I just thought I'd be happy just serving you like this, Master.
1570000042.korean: 저는 그저, 주인님을 이렇게 모시고만 있어도 행복할 거라 생각했어요.

1570000043.english: However, I also want to be loved more by my master. I want to spend some sweet time with my master.
1570000043.korean: 하지만, 저도 주인님께 더 사랑받고 싶어요. 주인님과 달콤한 시간을 보내고 싶어요.

1570000044.english: But I just keep causing you worry, and even while doing that, I worry about not being a good woman for you...
1570000044.korean: 근데 이렇게 걱정만 끼치고, 또 그러면서도 주인님께 좋은 여자가 되지 못할까 걱정하고…

1570000045.english: And yet, I want you, Master. I want to love my master. With my whole body...
1570000045.korean: 그러면서도 주인님을 원해요. 주인님을 사랑하고 싶어요. 제 온몸을 바쳐서…

1570000046.english: I'm a sinful woman... I thought only black mourning clothes were my attire.
1570000046.korean: 저는 죄 많은 여자에요… 검은 상복만이 제 옷이라고 생각했죠.

1570000047.english: But today, I want to be greedy. Just for today, even a sinner like me... Will you love me?
1570000047.korean: 근데 오늘은 욕심 내고 싶어요. 오늘만큼은, 죄 많은 절... 사랑해주실래요?

1570000048.english: Huh? What do you mean...? Oh...?!

1570000049.english: - I turned off the switch in Beta's quarters. Beta and I relied on each other's gazes, illuminated only by the stand's light.&nBeaming and at a loss for what to do, Beta brightly smiled and embraced my waist.
1570000049.korean: - 나는 베타의 숙소 스위치를 껐다. 나와 베타는 오직 스텐드 불빛에 서로의 시선을 의지했다.&n두근거리며 어쩔 줄 모르던 베타는 환하게 웃으며 내 허리를 끌어안았다.

1570000050.english: Master, then... may I be more greedy?
1570000050.korean: 주인님, 그럼… 제가 욕심을 더 부려도 될까요?

1570000051.english: My master, my beloved master... I swear eternal love and loyalty only to you.
1570000051.korean: 주인님, 제가 사랑하는 주인님… 영원한 사랑과 충성을 오직 주인님께 맹세 할게요.

1570000052.english: - Instead of answering Beta's words, I responded by hugging her tightly.
1570000052.korean: - 나는 베타의 말에 대답 대신 그녀를 꼭 끌어안는 것으로 화답했다.

1570000053.english: ...Master. I, um, have a gift I'd like to give to Master One.
1570000053.korean: …주인님. 저, 하나 주인님께 드리고 싶은 선물이 있어요.

1570000054.english: I... A long, long time ago... it was a song I used to sing every time I slept on a box... May I play it for you, Master?
1570000054.korean: 제가... 한참, 옛날에… 상자 깔고 잘 때마다 불렀던 노래였는데… 주인님께 한 번 들려줘도 되나요?

1570000055.english: - Lost in thought for a moment, Beta then embraced me and slowly began to sing.
1570000055.korean: - 잠시 생각에 잠기다, 베타는 나를 끌어안은 뒤, 천천히 노래를 부르기 시작했다.

1570000056.english: - A sad and sorrowful song... I wanted to comfort the sorrows of the betas, which I don't know well, just a little.&nNo... to be precise, I wanted to hear her past stories, just the two of us, all night long.
1570000056.korean: - 서글프고도 슬픈 노래… 내가 잘 모르는 베타의 설움을 조금은 보듬어주고 싶었다.&n아니… 정확히는 그녀의 지난 이야기를 단 둘이서 밤새도록 들어보고 싶었다.

1570000057.english: It might be a bit uncomfortable... are you sure you'll be okay?
1570000057.korean: 좀 거북하실 것 같은데… 정말 괜찮으시겠어요?

1570000058.english: - Beta eventually hesitated and then slowly began to tell me the story of her life.
1570000058.korean: - 베타는 결국 머뭇거리다 자신이 살아왔던 이야기를 조금씩 내게 풀어가기 시작했다.

1570000059.english: - The detailed wickedness of Simon and the story of Siete, who had to fight fiercely to survive even amidst that wickedness.&nAnd whenever she wiped her tears with the back of her hand, I would always respond by hugging her tightly.
1570000059.korean: - 시몬의 상세한 악행과, 그 악행 속에서도 치열하게 살아남아야만 했던 시에테의 이야기. &n그리고 이따금 그녀가 손등으로 눈물을 훔칠 때마다 꼭 끌어안는 것으로 보답했다.

1570000060.english: - And so, I lay in bed all night, continuing the seemingly endless story with Beta.
1570000060.korean: - 그렇게 나는 밤새도록 침대에 누워 베타와 함께 끝나지 않을 것만 같은 이야기를 이어갔다.

1570000063.english: I specifically asked Aurora to prepare things that would suit Beta's tastes.
1570000063.korean: 특별히 아우로라한테 부탁해서 베타의 취향에 맞을만한 것들 위주로 준비했어.

1570000064.english: Mr. Beta. I'm glad you look much better.
1570000064.korean: 베타 씨. 얼굴이 한층 좋아보이셔서 다행이에요.

1570000065.english: Thank you. I'm sorry for getting caught up in foolish delusions and causing you trouble in various ways.
1570000065.korean: 감사해요, 제가 괜히 바보 같은 망상에 빠져서… 여러모로 폐를 끼쳤네요.

1570000066.english: Most South American dishes seem to be heavily influenced by Spanish or Portuguese cuisine, right?
1570000066.korean: 대부분 남미 음식들은 스페인이나 포르투갈에서 전파한 음식들이 많이 차지하군요?

1570000067.english: Because South America was almost entirely dominated by two countries.&nThe rice pudding I like is also called arroz con leche in Spanish.
1570000067.korean: 남미는 거의 두 나라의 지배를 받았으니까요. &n제가 좋아하는 쌀 푸딩도 스페인어로는 아로스 콘 레체라고 하죠.

1570000068.english: Is it because we were talking about food? You look good, Beta... no, is it because you had a hot night with the Commander?
1570000068.korean: 역시 음식 얘기를 해서 그런가? 얼굴이 좋네, 베타… 아니, 사령관과 뜨거운 밤을 보내서 그런 건가?

1570000069.english: That, that, that kind of talk... Don't do it...! I'm embarrassed.
1570000069.korean: 그, 그, 그런 말씀은... 하지 마세요…! 부끄러워요.

1570000070.english: Isn't sexual pleasure just as thrilling and enjoyable as the pleasure of appetite?
1570000070.korean: 성적인 쾌락 또한 식욕의 쾌락 만큼이나 짜릿하고 좋은 거, 아니겠어?

1570000072.english: Anyway, there's a lot of food. Even for us, there's no way we could eat all of this, is there?
1570000072.korean: 그나저나, 음식이 많네요. 아무리 저희라도 이걸 다 먹을 순 없겠는 걸요?

1570000074.english: Oh, today... I've invited someone who has been a great help to me. Are you alright?
1570000074.korean: 아, 오늘은… 제가 많은 도움을 받았던 분을 한 번 모셔봤어요. 혹시… 괜찮으시죠?

1570000075.english: ...It's someone I really didn't expect to see.

1570000076.english: Please eat. I'll teach you how I especially enjoy eating it.
1570000076.korean: 어서 드세요. 특별히 제가 맛있게 먹는 법을 가르쳐 드릴게요.

1570000077.english: The Queen... I'm not interested in that kind of thing. Why bother... Ugh?!
1570000077.korean: 여왕... 이런 거 관심 없어. 굳이… 으브븝?!

1570000079.english: The Queen doesn't like sweets... What, uh-oh?!
1570000079.korean: 여왕은 이런 단 거 싫어… 어떻게, 으브븝?!

1570000080.english: ...Isn't that a food torture, Mr. Beta?

1570000081.english: Oh, when else would I get a chance to dine with Lady Titania if not now? Hehe... Thank you so much!
1570000081.korean: 에이, 이럴 때 아니면 언제 티타니아 님과 함께 식사해 볼 수 있겠어요? 헤헤… 정말 감사했어요!

1570000082.english: The Queen is getting fat... She said she wasn't eating... Uh?!
1570000082.korean: 여왕, 살 쪄… 안 먹는다고… 읍?!

1570000083.english: Fufut, Beta. Compared to before, your expression is definitely brighter, your face too.
1570000083.korean: 후훗, 베타. 처음보다 확실히 표정이 좋아졌어, 얼굴도 한결 밝아지고 말이야!

1570000084.english: You're right, Mr. Beta... Come to think of it, we haven't really heard each other's personal stories during the gourmet club meetings.&nIf it's not too much trouble, could you tell us about Mr. Beta as well?
1570000084.korean: 그러게요, 베타 씨… 그러고보니 미식회 하면서 개개인 이야기를 들은 적은 없네요.&n실례가 아니라면, 저희한테도 베타 씨 이야기를 해주실 수 있을까요?

1570000085.english: My life was as dark as this mourning dress.
1570000085.korean: 제 인생은 이 상복과도 같은 어둠이었어요.

1570000086.english: But everything changed after coming to Orca.&nBecause I've met someone who embraces my past, my sadness... and even my flaws.
1570000086.korean: 하지만, 오르카에 오고 나선 모든 게 달라졌죠. &n제 과거도, 제 슬픔도… 그리고 제 단점도 보듬어주시는 분을 만났으니까요.

1570000087.english: Fufu, I see. Beta… looks like you received a very good gift in another sense.
1570000087.korean: 후후, 그래. 베타… 다른 의미로 아주 좋은 선물을 받았나 보네.

1570000088.english: ...Heh heh. Yes. That's right. It was a gift that was too big and beautiful for me to handle.
1570000088.korean: …후훗. 네. 맞아요. 제가 감당 못할, 아주 크고 아름다운 선물이었어요.

1570000089.english: It's a great gift that I'll never experience again in my lifetime.
1570000089.korean: 제 평생을 살아도 다시 없을… 저의 큰 선물이요.

1570000091.english: Oh, I'm sorry. I should have gone to look for it myself.
1570000091.korean: 이런, 미안해. 내가 직접 찾으러 가야 했는데.

1570000094.english: Beta gave us a bed... You slept on the cardboard box, didn't you?
1570000094.korean: 베타는 우리한테 침대 주고... 박스 깔고 잤었지?

1570000096.english: The Beta clones ignored and bullied me in various ways.

1570000104.english: ...If you were that lonely and sad, why didn't you say something?

1570000105.english: Beta, can we talk for a moment?
1570000105.korean: 베타, 나랑 잠깐 이야기 좀 할까?

1570000108.english: Well, this is the beta I've always wanted.
1570000108.korean: 그럼, 내가 바라는 베타는 언제나 이런 모습이었어.

1570000109.english: Honestly... this is the first time I've seen a member seduce someone like this.
1570000109.korean: 솔직히… 이런 방식으로 유혹하는 대원은… 베타가 처음인데?

1570000110.english: Just today? You can't just love me for today.

1570000111.english: I'll have to show you once. How much I love betas.
1570000111.korean: 한 번 보여줘야겠네. 내가 얼마나 베타를 사랑하는지.

1570000113.english: Huh? Are there more gifts beside the beta?
1570000113.korean: 응? 베타 말고 선물이 더 있어?

1570000114.english: Beta... can you tell me a bit about when you were in Caracas?
1570000114.korean: 베타… 카라카스 있었을 때 이야기… 잠깐 해줄 수 있어?

1570000115.english: It's not uncomfortable, I really want to hear about Beta.
1570000115.korean: 거북하긴, 베타 이야기 난 정말 듣고 싶은데.

1594000002.english: - To get some fresh air for a moment, I ordered the Orca to surface.
1594000002.korean: - 잠시 바람을 쐬기 위해, 오르카 호의 부상을 명령했다.

1594000003.english: - As the hatch opens, the area around the ship quickly becomes crowded with crew members flying or sunbathing to relieve the stuffiness they've endured.&nBut for some reason, my gaze turned toward Alcyone, who was silently staring at the sea.
1594000003.korean: - 해치가 열리자 그간의 갑갑함을 풀기 위해 비행하거나, 일광욕을 즐기는 대원들로 삽시 주위가 붐빈다.&n하지만 어찌된 일인지 내 시선은 말없이 바다를 바라보는 알키오네에게로 향했다.

1594000005.english: - Seeing someone who loves swimming but is just staring endlessly at the sea surface bothers me.
1594000005.korean: - 수영을 좋아하면서도 그저 하염없이 해수면만 바라보고 있는 모습을 보자, 신경이 쓰인다.

1594000006.english: Huh? What are you talking about? I couldn't possibly be in a bad mood, Master~&nDon't worry about it! Hmm, sigh... Shall I go for a swim then?
1594000006.korean: 응? 무슨 소리야, 기분 안 좋을 리 없잖아, 주인님~&n신경 쓰지 마! 으흐흠, 하아… 그럼 수영이나 해볼까나?

1594000008.english: - Alcyone jumped into the sea as if to avoid me.&nAs expected of an orca, the way it effortlessly cuts through the waves is exhilarating, but...
1594000008.korean: - 알키오네는 나를 피하듯 바다로 뛰어들었다. &n범고래 답게 시원스레 파도를 가르며 나가는 모습이 호쾌하지만...

1594000009.english: That's not like Alcyone... Admiral, did you perhaps tease Alcyone about gaining weight?
1594000009.korean: 알키오네 답지 못하구나… 제독, 혹시 알키오네한테 살쪘다고 놀렸나?

1594000010.english: That's strange. It doesn't feel like the usual Alcyone.
1594000010.korean: 이상하구나. 평소의 알키오네 같은 느낌이 아니다.

1594000011.english: - Melite nodded without answering.&nAs I recall, the Alcyone I first met was lively and friendly.
1594000011.korean: - 멜리테는 대답 없이 고개만 끄덕였다.&n내가 떠올리기로도 처음 만났던 알키오네는 활발하고 붙임성이 좋았었다.

1594000012.english: I wonder if it's because of the sisters...

1594000013.english: - Even if you bravely accepted the deaths of your sisters,&nI was worried that perhaps I hadn't fully overcome it yet.
1594000013.korean: - 의연하게 자매들의 죽음을 받아들였더라도,&n아직 제대로 극복하지 못한 것이 아닐까 염려스러웠다.

1594000014.english: - Even if it's Delta's scheme,&nHow will you bear the agony of killing your sisters with your own hands...
1594000014.korean: - 델타의 계략이라 하더라도, &n자매들을 자신의 손으로 죽인 참담함을 어떻게 받아들이겠는가…

1594000015.english: Kyahahaha~ Master! Look at this! What did I catch?!
1594000015.korean: 꺄하하하~ 주인님! 이거 봐봐! 내가 뭐 잡아왔게?!

1594000016.english: Oh, Alcyone. Did you catch it using bombs again this time?
1594000016.korean: 오오, 알키오네. 이번에도 폭탄을 써서 잡은 거냐?

1594000017.english: - Alcyone, who had disappeared from sight for a moment, reappeared not long after.&n...she had a huge tuna tucked under her arm... it looked like she'd caught it with her bare hands.
1594000017.korean: - 잠시 시야에서 사라진 알키오네는 얼마 지나지 않아 다시 나타났다.&n…옆구리에는 거대한 참치가 들려 있었는데… 맨손으로 잡은 것 같다.

1594000018.english: Oh, come on, I was swimming, and a school of tuna just happened to swim by.&nI knocked him out with a flick of my tail and then caught him!
1594000018.korean: 에이~ 헤엄치고 있는데, 마침 옆에 참치 떼가 지나가더라고.&n꼬리로 톡 쳐서 기절시킨 다음 잡았지!

1594000019.english: - Judging by how it's not even twitching, it seems like it was hit in the tail and died instantly.
1594000019.korean: - 퍼덕거리도 않는 걸 보니까 꼬리에 맞고 즉사한 거 같은데.

1594000020.english: Oh, that's quite good, Alcyone! I'll ask So-wan to filet the fish for me!
1594000020.korean: 오오, 제법이구나 알키오네! 소완한테 부탁해서 회를 떠달라 하면 되겠구나!

1594000021.english: What are you talking about? Tuna is delicious when grilled!
1594000021.korean: 무슨 소리야? 참치는 구워먹어야 맛있는 거라고!

1594000022.english: - Before long, Alcyone brought a huge griddle.&nAnd then, with familiar ease, she skewered the tuna and started a fire to grill it.
1594000022.korean: - 알키오네는 얼마 지나지 않아, 거대한 구이판을 들고 왔다.&n그리고 익숙하게 참치를 쇠꼬챙이에 끼운 뒤, 불을 지펴 굽기 시작했다.

1594000023.english: Yes! In Malta, all of us sisters used to catch and eat them like this.
1594000023.korean: 응! 몰타에선 우리 자매들 모두가 이렇게 잡아서 먹곤 했었어.

1594000024.english: After Maia-Big Sis said she'd slice up the fish once and then butchered it, it became natural to just roast it whole...&nMerope would grumble about it being roasted again, but she always ate more than anyone else, I tell you!
1594000024.korean: 마이아 언니가 한 번 회 뜬다고 했다가 난도질을 해버린 뒤론 통으로 구워먹는 게 당연해졌지...&n메로페는 또 통구이냐고 투덜거리다가도 매번 누구보다 엄~ 청 잘 먹었다니까!

1594000025.english: ...in Malta, it really was like that.

1594000026.english: Fufut, if that's the case, it can't be helped. May I have a bite too?
1594000026.korean: 후훗, 그런 거라면 어쩔 수 없구나. 나도 한 입 먹어봐도 되겠나?

1594000027.english: Then, Princess Mel! It's probably going to taste completely different from what I had in Malta... hehe...
1594000027.korean: 그럼, 멜 공주! 몰타에서 먹던 맛이랑은 전혀 다를 것 같긴 하지만… 헤헤…

1594000029.english: Hehe, big brother! It's been a while since we've met in such a bright place, hasn't it? Right?
1594000029.korean: 헤헤, 오빠! 이렇게 밝은데서 만나는 건 오랜만이네? 그렇지?

1594000030.english: - Even the doctor, who is always engrossed in her work in the lab, must have really wanted to get some fresh air today.&nAs I gently stroked her head, which was affectionately nestled against my waist, she sniffled.
1594000030.korean: - 늘 연구실에 앉아 몰두하는 닥터도 오늘 만큼은 바깥 공기를 상당히 쐬고 싶었나 보다.&n살갑게 허리에 안겨오는 그녀의 머리를 부드럽게 쓰다듬던 그때, 그녀가 코를 킁킁거렸다.

1594000031.english: Huh? Where are you cooking? What's that smell of grilling fish?
1594000031.korean: 응? 어디서 요리해? 웬 생선 굽는 냄새?

1594000032.english: Has the doctor come too? Come here quickly and let's eat together!
1594000032.korean: 닥터도 왔느냐? 얼른 여기 와서 함께 먹자꾸나!

1594000033.english: What's that? Is it okay for me to eat it?
1594000033.korean: 그게 뭔데? 내가 먹어도 괜찮은 거야?

1594000034.english: Of course! Doctor? Doctor, what part do you like? Tail? Toro?
1594000034.korean: 당연하지! 닥터? 닥터는 어떤 부위 좋아해? 꼬리? 대뱃살?

1594000036.english: - The doctor shook her head and then subtly stood beside me, tugging at my sleeve.
1594000036.korean: - 닥터는 고개를 도리도리 젓곤 슬쩍 내 옆에 서, 옷자락을 잡아당겼다.

1594000038.english: ...How long has it been since we left Malta?

1594000039.english: Sister Alcyone. I know you haven't been sleeping lately and just stare out the Orca's window all the time, right?
1594000039.korean: 알키오네 언니. 요즘 잠도 안 자고 맨날 오르카 호 창문 밖만 바라보는 거 알고 있지?

1594000040.english: - Hearing the doctor's words, I thought of Alcyone's recent appearance.
1594000040.korean: - 닥터의 말에 나는 알키오네의 근래 모습을 떠올렸다.

1594000041.english: - Staring blankly at the fish swimming, or not answering for a long time even when I call...
1594000041.korean: - 멍하니 물고기들이 헤엄치는 걸 바라본다거나, 내가 불러도 한참 동안 대답이 없다거나…

1594000042.english: It seems like Alcyone-nee-san is homesick... She seems much more down than when I first saw her.
1594000042.korean: 아무래도 알키오네 언니, 향수병 같아 보여… 처음 봤을 때보다 훨씬 저기압인 것 같아.

1594000043.english: - Thinking about it, I left that place too early.&nSince Alcyone didn't show her feelings much, I didn't hesitate to rush.
1594000043.korean: - 생각해보니, 너무 일찍, 그 자리를 떠난 것 같다.&n알키오네가 티를 잘 내지 않다 보니 서두르는 데 거리낌이 없었다.

1594000044.english: - Just as Alcyone was in a dream she didn't want to wake up from for a long time,&nI should have accepted the reality and given myself time to slowly process my emotions.
1594000044.korean: - 알키오네가 오랜 시간 깨어나고 싶지 않았던 꿈속에 있었던 만큼,&n현실을 받아들이고 천천히 감정을 정리할 시간을 주었어야 했는데.

1594000045.english: - It must not have been easy to shake off the grief of losing your sisters.
1594000045.korean: - 자매들을 잃었던 슬픔을 쉽사리 떨치는 건 역시 쉽지 않은 일이었겠지.

1594000046.english: Alcyone...? Why are you suddenly crying?

1594000047.english: Ugh... huh? What, what are you saying, Princess Mel?&nOh... why are you suddenly crying?! Haha, what a joke...
1594000047.korean: 으… 응? 무, 무슨 소리야~, 멜 공주! &n내가 오… 왜 갑자기 울어?! 하하~ 농담도 참…

1594000048.english: Hm… then did I see wrong?
1594000048.korean: 흠… 그럼 내가 잘못 본 것이냐?

1594000049.english: Heheng… guess the smoke from grilling was a little spicy~ Come on, eat a lot, Princess Mel!  &nIf it's not enough, I can catch more for you? Ah right, Master!
1594000049.korean: 헤헹… 굽는 연기가 좀 매웠나 봐~ 자, 얼른 많이 먹어 멜 공주!&n부족하면 내가 더 잡아올 수도 있다? 아 맞다, 주인님!

1594000050.english: - Alcyone rushed over to me, panting, and threw her arms around my arm.&nTurning my head, I saw Alcyone smiling brightly at me.
1594000050.korean: - 알키오네는 헐레벌떡 내게 달려오더니, 덥석 내 팔을 끌어안았다.&n고개를 돌려보니 알키오네는 환하게 날 바라보며 웃고 있었다.

1594000051.english: Master, would you like a bite of my Maltese grilled tuna?
1594000051.korean: 주인님도 내 몰타 표 참치 구이 한입 할래?

1594000052.english: Huh? Master, your expression is strange, isn't it? Are you saying that because you think it won't taste good?
1594000052.korean: 응? 주인님 표정이 이상한데~? 설마 맛 없을 것 같아 그런 거야?

1594000053.english: - Even if I wanted to pretend not to know, Alcyone's tail was lifeless.
1594000053.korean: - 애써 모른 척 해주고 싶어도 알키오네의 꼬리는 활기가 없었다.

1594000054.english: Master...? Why are you suddenly acting so serious...? By any chance... did I do something wrong?
1594000054.korean: 주인님...? 갑자기 왜 무게 잡는 거야…? 혹시… 내가 뭐 잘못한 거라도 있어?

1594000055.english: Huh? What do you mean, Master?

1594000056.english: - At the word 'Malta', Alcyone's expression darkened considerably.
1594000056.korean: - '몰타'라는 단어에 알키오네의 표정엔 깊은 그늘이 졌다.

1594000057.english: ...Master, Master, what are you talking about all of a sudden! The tuna I worked so hard to bake is going to get cold! Come quickly and eat with me, okay?
1594000057.korean: …주, 주인님, 무슨 소리야 갑자기! 애써 구운 참치가 다 식겠네! 얼른 와서 같이 먹자, 응?

1594000058.english: Master, if you keep saying strange things, am I going to get angry?
1594000058.korean: 주인님, 자꾸 이상한 소리 하면 나 화낼 거야?

1594000060.english: - The sharp voice of Alcyone, which I had never heard before, jolted me awake.
1594000060.korean: - 처음 듣는 알키오네의 날카로운 목소리에 정신이 번뜩 들었다.

1594000062.english: ...No, I'm sorry for getting angry, Master.

1594000065.english: Sorry, Princess Mel. My stomach suddenly feels a bit upset, so... do you want to share the tuna with the others?
1594000065.korean: 미안 멜 공주. 갑자기 속이 좀 불편해져서… 참치는 다른 애들이랑 마저 나눠먹을래?

1594000066.english: - Alcyone quickly disappeared from our sight.&nJust as I was frantically trying to grab Alcyone's wrist, the doctor embraced my waist.
1594000066.korean: - 알키오네는 재빨리 우리의 시야에서 사라졌다.&n황급히 알키오네의 손목을 잡아채려는 순간, 닥터가 나의 허리를 끌어안았다.

1594000067.english: Big Brother. Let's just leave Alcyone alone for now. You look so tired.
1594000067.korean: 오빠. 지금은 알키오네 언니 그냥 두자. 너무 힘들어 보여.

1594000068.english: - Just like a deep scar remains even after the blood stops flowing from a wound...&nAlcyone also needs time to face the scars that have settled in after her wounds have healed.
1594000068.korean: - 상처에 흐르는 피가 멎어도 짙은 흉터가 남는 것처럼...&n알키오네에게도 상처가 아문 이후 자리 잡은 흉터를 마주할 수 있는 시간이 필요한 것이다.

1594000070.english: You look like you're in a bad mood.

1594000071.english: ...Do you think I would say something like that?

1594000073.english: I really hope that's not the reason...

1594000074.english: You must have really wanted to eat that, huh?

1594000079.english: It's been a while, hasn't it...?

1594000080.english: Come to think of it, that's true.

1594000084.english: Maybe we left too early, didn't we?
1594000084.korean: 아무래도 우리가 너무 일찍 떠난 거지?

1594000087.english: Should we go to Malta again?

1595000001.english: - After returning to the commander's office, I stared blankly out the window just like she had.&nAlthough it's my sincere wish to do my best for each and every member...
1595000001.korean: - 사령관실에 돌아온 후, 나는 그녀처럼 멍하니 창밖을 바라보았다.&n대원들 모두에게 각각 최선을 다하고 싶은 게 내 진심이긴 하지만...

1595000002.english: So, the reason you're suddenly leaving is to revisit Malta?
1595000002.korean: 이렇게 갑자기 자리를 비우시는 이유가 몰타를 재방문하기 위해서라고요?

1595000003.english: - I explained to Alpha, listening to the words of the doctor and Melite, the recent situation regarding Alcyone.
1595000003.korean: - 나는 알파에게 최근 알키오네의 상황과 관련해 닥터와 멜리테의 말을 들어가며 설명했다.

1595000004.english: I understand what you're saying, but... are you really sure it's okay to go with such a small number of people?
1595000004.korean: 말씀은 잘 알겠지만… 적은 수의 인원만 데리고 가셔도 정말 괜찮으시겠어요?

1595000005.english: - Fortunately, since I was only going to an area secured by the Orca Resistance for a short time, it wasn't too difficult to get Alpha's agreement as well.
1595000005.korean: - 다행히 오르카 저항군이 확보한 지역으로 잠시 출타하는 것이니 알파에게도 동의를 받아내는 데 큰 어려움이 없었다.

1595000006.english: Understood, Master. You might as well take this opportunity to get some rest and come back feeling refreshed.
1595000006.korean: 알겠습니다, 주인님. 이김에 편히 휴식을 취하고 오시는 편이 좋을 것 같네요.

1595000007.english: Fufu, Admiral. Is it true you're returning to Malta?
1595000007.korean: 후후, 제독. 몰타로 돌아간다는 말이 사실이더냐?

1595000008.english: Oh my, did Master give you a heads-up beforehand?

1595000009.english: I saw Alcyone wasn't feeling comfortable anyway, so I spoke to the admiral first.&nI'm sorry to Alpha, but I would be grateful if you could lend me the admiral for a moment.
1595000009.korean: 안 그래도 알키오네가 마음 편칠 않아 하는 걸 본 내가 제독에게 먼저 말했지.&n알파에게는 미안한 일이지만, 잠시 제독을 빌려주면 고맙겠다.

1595000010.english: Since it's Master's relaxing vacation, I hope you won't bother them too much.
1595000010.korean: 주인님이 편하게 즐기는 휴가이니만큼 너무 괴롭히진 않으셨으면 좋겠어요.

1595000011.english: Okay. I'll persuade Alcyone well, so,&nAdmiral, be prepared to soothe Alcyone's heart in Malta.
1595000011.korean: 알겠다. 알키오네에겐 내가 잘 설득 해놓을 테니, &n제독은 몰타에서 알키오네의 마음을 달래줄 준비를 해두거라.

1595000012.english: - I gave them a thumbs up and smiled.
1595000012.korean: - 나는 엄지를 치켜들며 그녀들에게 웃어 보였다.

1595000013.english: Hoo… I didn't think I'd come back here again.
1595000013.korean: 후우... 이곳에 다시 올 줄은 몰랐네.

1595000014.english: Have you ever been here before, Satgat?

1595000015.english: Before joining Orca, I had been here before. I'm feeling complicated in many ways.
1595000015.korean: 오르카에 합류하기 전, 이곳에 온 적이 있었네. 여러모로 기분이 복잡하군.

1595000016.english: Did something happen to you here?
1595000016.korean: 여기서 무슨 일을 겪으시기라도 하신 겁니까?

1595000017.english: When I first came here, there was a young woman named Atlas,&nNo... I did meet a man, and he had an intelligent logical circuit.
1595000017.korean: 처음 이곳에 왔을 때는, 아틀라스라는 낭자, &n아니… 사내를 만난 적이 있었지, 지적인 논리회로를 가졌였지.

1595000018.english: By "man," do you mean that person was a male?
1595000018.korean: 사내라 하면, 그 자는 남성이었단 말입니까.

1595000019.english: ...that's what they say. Alcyone-dono's last words were "Papa," so that makes sense.

1595000020.english: You have unusual tastes, Satgat. I will respect it.
1595000020.korean: 삿갓은 특이한 취향을 가지고 있으셨군요. 존중하겠습니다.

1595000025.english: Shade, just in case... Please don't misunderstand.

1595000028.english: It's been a long time since I've been in such a bright place, always hiding away like this.
1595000028.korean: 늘 숨어만 다니다 이렇게 밝은 곳에 있는 건 정말 오랜만이다.

1595000029.english: The commander told us to have some free time, senior.&nSo, are you still planning to protect the commander, senior?
1595000029.korean: 사령관은 우리에게 자유로운 시간을 보내라 말했었다, 선배.&n선배는 그래도 사령관을 지킬 생각인가?

1595000030.english: Of course. Even tho the commander told me to rest, I still intend to be faithful to my mission...
1595000030.korean: 당연하지. 사령관님이 아무리 쉬라 했어도 임무에는 충실할 생각…

1595000031.english: ...Senior, are you by any chance... thinking of going to Orca Park?&nI want to go and try on the Orca Park headband and eat cotton candy.
1595000031.korean: …선배, 혹시… 오르카 파크에 갈 생각은 없는가?&n가서 오르카 파크 머리띠도 해보고, 솜사탕도 먹어보고 싶다.

1595000033.english: That stern look was indeed... Senior. I'm sorry.&nI was in charge of protecting the commander... I got caught up in the thought that I could play for a while...
1595000033.korean: 그 엄한 눈빛은 역시... 선배. 미안하다.&n사령관 경호를 맡았는데... 잠시 놀아도 된다는 생각에 빠져서…

1595000034.english: Let's go together... and eat cotton candy... and dress up as Magical Momo in the sticker photo booth...
1595000034.korean: 같이… 가서 솜사탕도 먹고… 스티커 사진기에서 매지컬 모모 복장도…

1595000035.english: I never thought you'd be interested in Magical Momo these days too, senior...&nCould we possibly dress up together and take some photos?
1595000035.korean: 선배도 매지컬 모모를 요새 관심 있어 할 줄은 몰랐다…&n혹시 같이, 분장하고 사진도 같이 찍을 수 있나?

1595000036.english: That's a good idea... If you don't know the magical pose, I'll teach you myself.
1595000036.korean: 좋은 생각이다… 혹시 매지컬 포즈를 모른다면 내가 직접 가르쳐줄게.

1595000037.english: A magical pose with the senior I admire... As expected, Senior Phantom knows something!
1595000037.korean: 동경하는 선배랑 매지컬 포즈… 역시 팬텀 선배는 뭔가 잘 안다!

1595000038.english: ...You don't have to go this far.

1595000039.english: - Alcyone, who had come to Malta, answered hesitantly, looking somewhat apologetic.&nShe looked as if she felt guilty for taking time out of my busy schedule to come here again.
1595000039.korean: - 몰타에 온 알키오네는 괜스레 미안한 모습으로 쭈삣거리듯 대답했다.&n바쁜 시간을 내어 다시 이곳을 찾은 일에 괜스레 죄책감을 가지는 모습이었다.

1595000041.english: - I stood beside Alcyone and gently held her hand.&nThe tail twitched slightly as if startled for a moment, but then it swayed gently and led me forward.
1595000041.korean: - 나는 알키오네의 옆에 서서 슬쩍 손을 잡았다.&n잠시 움찔한 듯 꼬리가 살랑거렸지만, 부드럽게 나를 이끌며 앞으로 나아갔다.

1595000042.english: Haha... haa... I'm such an idiot.&nEven tho I like my master... I don't know why this place keeps coming back to mind again."
1595000042.korean: 하하… 하아… 나 정말 바보 같아.&n주인님을 좋아하면서도… 왜 또다시 이곳이 떠오르는 건지 모르겠어.

1595000043.english: The food at Orca is delicious, and the new crew members are comfortable and nice.
1595000043.korean: 오르카의 음식도 맛있고, 새로운 대원들도 편하고 좋아.

1595000044.english: But... when I'm alone... I just suddenly think of this place.
1595000044.korean: 그런데… 혼자 있을 때면… 그냥 문득 이곳이 생각나.

1595000045.english: - Although she tried to act calm, Alcyone was, after all, a Bioroid that felt emotions.&nAlcyone has lived here with the researchers and her sisters for a long time, so it's natural that she feels Malta is like her home.
1595000045.korean: - 애써 담담한 척 했지만 결국, 알키오네도 엄연히 감정을 느끼는 바이오로이드였다.&n알키오네는 오랜시간 연구원들, 그리고 자매들과 이곳에서 지냈으니 몰타를 고향처럼 느끼고 있음이 당연하다.

1595000046.english: - Alcyone was silently gazing at the horizon over the Maltese beach with melancholic eyes.&nPerhaps she was reminiscing about the things she had done with her sisters, so I decided to quietly give her some space.
1595000046.korean: - 알키오네는 말없이 우수에 젖은 눈으로 몰타 해변의 수평선을 바라보고 있었다.&n어쩌면 자매들과 함께 추억했던 일들을 곱씹는 것 같아, 슬쩍 자리를 비켜주기로 했다.

1595000047.english: Alcyone! I was just looking for you, and you were here all along?
1595000047.korean: 알키오네! 안 그래도 찾고 있었는데, 여기 있었던 것이냐?

1595000049.english: I thought you were having a good time with the admiral at Orca Park...?
1595000049.korean: 오르카 파크에 제독이랑 즐거운 시간을 보내고 있는 줄 알았는데…?

1595000051.english: ...Alcyone. Of course, I know it's a difficult job.&nI, too, have lost colleagues, friends, and sisters here.
1595000051.korean: …알키오네. 물론 힘든 일이라는 건 잘 안다. &n나 또한 여기서 동료와 친구, 자매들을 모두 잃은 적이 있지.

1595000052.english: But that doesn't mean we can stay stuck in the same place forever, Alcyone...&nBecause the past is always receding from us, and we can never meet it again.
1595000052.korean: 하지만 그렇다고 해서 영원히 제자리걸음만을 할 수는 없겠지, 알키오네…&n과거는 늘 우리와 멀어지고, 다시 만날 수는 없기 때문이니까.

1595000054.english: Haha, I've been talking a lot... Anyway, Alcyone, haven't you and the admiral ever been to Orca Park alone together?&n... It would be good to take the time to visit and play with the admiral.
1595000054.korean: 하핫, 말이 많아졌네… 그나저나 알키오네는 제독과 단 둘이 오르카 파크에서 가본 적 없지 않나?&n..시간을 내어 제독과 함께 방문해 놀아보는 것이 좋겠다.

1595000055.english: I heard a new attraction was built at Orca Park recently.&nHmm... did you say the Malta Horror Mansion? They say it's a very scary haunted house...
1595000055.korean: 듣기론 요새 오르카 파크에 새로운 어트랙션이 만들어졌다고 한다.&n흐음… 몰타 호러 맨션이라고 했나? 아주 무시무시한 유령의 집이라 하던데…

1595000057.english: Huh? It's the most fun attraction in Orca, would you like to go?
1595000057.korean: 응? 오르카 내에서 가장 재밌다는 어트랙션인데, 가보지 않겠나?

1595000059.english: I'm not forcing you. What I want to say is...&nThey want to build many memories with us and see us overcome the past and move forward with strength.
1595000059.korean: 굳이 강요하는 건 아니다. 내가 말하고 싶은 건… &n우리와 함께 많은 추억을 쌓아 과거를 이기고 힘차게 나아가는 모습을 보고 싶은 것이다.

1595000060.english: Just like a few days ago, when you swam through the rough waves and caught a giant tuna!
1595000060.korean: 며칠 전, 네가 험한 파도를 헤엄쳐, 거대한 참치를 잡아왔던 것처럼 말이다!

1595000063.english: I don't like scary things, but... anyway, Master took special time for me, so I can't just stay like this!
1595000063.korean: 무서운 건 싫지만… 어쨌든 주인님이 날 위해 특별히 시간을 내줬는데 이러고만 있을 순 없지!

1595000064.english: Yes, that's the smile, Alcyone.&nThe admiral also seemed to miss Alcyone's bright smile a lot.
1595000064.korean: 그래, 그 웃음이다 알키오네.&n제독도 알키오네가 환히 웃는 모습을 많이 그리워 하더군.

1595000065.english: What, what are you talking about, Princess Mel? The strange sound...
1595000065.korean: 무, 무슨 소리야 멜 공주. 이상한 소리는…

1595000066.english: Okay, then, I'll assume we're making memories at Orca Park with the admiral tomorrow!
1595000066.korean: 그럼, 내일은 제독과 함께 오르카 파크에서 추억을 쌓는 걸로 알겠다!

1595000069.english: Just assign enough security personnel that Alcyone won't notice.
1595000069.korean: 알키오네가 눈치채지 못할 정도로만 경호 인력을 붙여줘.

1595000073.english: Alcyone, would you like to go visit your sisters? You should say hello.
1595000073.korean: 알키오네, 자매들한테 다녀 올래? 인사 해야지.

1596000001.english: - Meanwhile, I was leisurely exploring the island of Malta alone when I encountered a Satgat.
1596000001.korean: - 한편, 여유롭게 혼자 몰타 섬을 돌아다니고 있던 난 삿갓과 마주쳤다.

1596000002.english: I was just taking a quick look around Orca Park, Commander.&nThere are quite a few sexy ladies with logical circuits at Orca Park too.
1596000002.korean: 잠깐 오르카 파크 주변을 둘러보고 있었네, 사령관.&n오르카 파크에도 논리회로가 섹시한 낭자들이 퍽 많더군.

1596000003.english: They say Shade has been avoiding me since misunderstanding me so badly.
1596000003.korean: 쉐이드는 내게 큰 오해를 한 뒤로 날 피해다니고 있다네.

1596000004.english: Let's talk about that later. Anyway, what's the commander doing here?&nI thought you'd be spending time with Lady Alcyone by now.
1596000004.korean: 그건… 나중에 얘기하도록 하세. 그나저나 사령관은 웬일이지? &n지금 쯤 알키오네 낭자와 시간을 보내고 있을 줄 알았는데.

1596000005.english: - I told the Satgat the story of Alcyone.&nAs he listened to the story, Satgat crossed his arms and slowly nodded his head.
1596000005.korean: - 나는 삿갓에게 알키오네의 이야기를 털어놓았다.&n이야기를 듣던 삿갓은 팔짱을 낀 채 고개를 천천히 끄덕였다.

1596000006.english: Hmm. Nostalgia for home. Remembering the sisters who passed away…
1596000006.korean: 흐음. 고향을 그리워하는 감정이라. 죽은 자매들을 추억한다라…

1596000007.english: I remember that even in the old records of humans before the apocalypse that I looked into, there were a lot of those kinds of phrases.&nOf course, I was just made in a factory, and I'm not even a brother...
1596000007.korean: 내가 찾아 봤던 멸망 전 인간들의 옛 자료에도 특히나 그런 류의 글귀들이 많았던걸 기억하네.&n물론 나는 그저 공장에서 만들어 냈고, 형제라 할 것도 없는 몸이지만…

1596000008.english: If I were to apply the experiences I've had wandering the world and the emotions that have built up layer upon layer as a result... it's not surprising that I wouldn't understand.
1596000008.korean: 온 세상을 유랑해 보면서 겪은 일과 이로 인해 겹겹이 쌓여온 감정을 대입해 보자면… 이해가 안 될 것 또한 없군.

1596000009.english: Since I also gained emotions, I've been tormented by things that can't be filled, things that are difficult to explain in words.&nThe sudden ache in my heart as the wind rustles the leaves... that must be what loneliness is, right?"
1596000009.korean: 나 또한 감정을 가진 뒤론 무언가 채워지지 않는, 말로는 설명하기 어려운 것들로부터 괴로웠다네.&n잎새에 이는 바람에 별안간 감정이 아릿한 것… 그것이 외로움이란 놈이겠지?

1596000010.english: Even someone like me, who is like this, is lonely and searching for a companion... Why doesn't the commander fill your heart, my lady?
1596000010.korean: 이런 나조차 외로워 짝을 찾아 다니는 것을… 사령관은 어찌하여 낭자의 마음을 채워주지 않는 건가?

1596000011.english: - The Satgat lightly tapped my shoulder.
1596000011.korean: - 삿갓은 내 어깨를 가볍게 툭툭 쳤다.

1596000012.english: Commander, how about we take Miss Alcyone to Orca Park tomorrow to have some fun?&nLoneliness can be washed away by companionship, that's the conclusion I've come to after meeting many women over the years.
1596000012.korean: 사령관, 내일 오르카 파크에 알키오네 낭자를 데리고 놀러 가는 것이 어떻겠나.&n외로움은 어울림으로 씻어낼 수 있다네, 그동안 많은 낭자와 만나오며 내린 결론이지.

1596000013.english: - I reached out my hand to the Satgat. Satgat reached out his hand and shook mine with a pleasant smile.
1596000013.korean: 나는 삿갓에게 손을 내밀었다. 삿갓은 손을 내밀어 기분 좋게 나와 악수해주었다.

1596000014.english: Alright, has everyone gathered without exception?

1596000015.english: What did you call me for all of a sudden?

1596000016.english: I have something I'd like to ask of you all. Could you help me out just for tomorrow?
1596000016.korean: 제군들에게 부탁하고 싶은 일이 있는데, 내일 하루만 나를 도와줄 수 있겠나?

1596000017.english: What's going on? Is this related to the commander?

1596000018.english: With the help of Satgat, the admiral's close friend,&nI've created an atmosphere where it feels like Alcyone and the admiral absolutely have to go on a date tomorrow.
1596000018.korean: 제독의 절친인 삿갓의 도움을 받아, &n내일 알키오네와 제독이 꼭 데이트를 해야 될 것만 같은 분위기를 조성해 두었다.

1596000019.english: However, Alcyone would surely hesitate and not easily reveal her true feelings...&nI think I'll need your help, gentlemen.
1596000019.korean: 하지만 분명 알키오네는 망설임에 쉽사리 속마음을 털어내지 못할 터... &n제군들이 도와주어야 할 것 같네.

1596000020.english: You're going to help? How are you going to help?

1596000022.english: Indeed, the bond between a man and a woman only deepens when they overcome something together, just the two of them.&nEspecially Lady Alcyone, they say she has a princess-like character, contrary to her appearance.
1596000022.korean: 무릇, 남녀의 정이란 단 둘이서 무언가를 헤쳐 나갈 때 비로소 깊어지는 법이지.&n특히나 알키오네 낭자는 보기와 다르게 공주와 같은 성품을 가지고 있다 하더군.

1596000023.english: It's a bit childish, but... it seems right for the ladies to help with the horror event for Lady Alcyone and the commander.
1596000023.korean: 좀 유치하긴 하지만… 알키오네 낭자와 사령관을 위한 호러 이벤트를 낭자들께서 도와주는 게 옳은 듯 하군.

1596000025.english: Lady Melite says there's a haunted house attraction called the Malta Horror Mansion in Orca Park.&nI've heard rave reviews that the other ladies are also quite chilling...
1596000025.korean: 멜리테 낭자가 말하길, 오르카 파크에는 몰타 호러 맨션이란 유령의 집 어트렉션이 있다 하지.&n다른 낭자들 또한 제법 오싹하다는 호평이 자자하더군…

1596000027.english: Senior, why are you suddenly shaking your shoulders?
1596000027.korean: 선배, 왜 갑자기 어깨를 떠는 거지?

1596000028.english: It's cold, Wraith. I didn't realize Malta would be this cold...
1596000028.korean: 추워서 그래, 레이스. 몰타가 이렇게 추울 줄은 몰랐…

1596000032.english: ... Ahhhhh, lately I've been going to karaoke with Shade and practicing my high notes.&nLace, don't misunderstand, this is an exercise that's excellent for training diaphragmatic breathing even when you're not racing.
1596000032.korean: ...아아아아아아, 요즘 쉐이드와 함께 노래방에 다니며 고음을 연습 중이다.&n레이스, 절대 오해하지 마라, 이건 평소에도 복식 호흡을 단련하는데 탁월한 효과를 가진 운동이다.

1596000033.english: If I made you feel fear, Phantom, I apologize.

1596000034.english: ... Senior. You can be honest with me.

1596000035.english: Oh, Shade. You've come in a rather frightening body, haven't you? This should surprise Alcyone!
1596000035.korean: 오오, 쉐이드. 제법 무서운 소체로 와줬구나, 이정도라면 알키오네도 깜짝 놀라겠군!

1596000036.english: Before the destruction, I never thought I'd have to use this body again, which was said to have been used by only a few individuals.&nSince I was told I'd need to use this body, Goltharion taught me how to act like a reaper.
1596000036.korean: 멸망 전, 일부 개체들만 썼다던 이 소체를 이렇게 다시 쓸 일이 생길 줄은 몰랐습니다.&n이 소체를 쓸 일이 있다고 하니, 골타리온이 제게 사신 연기를 가르쳐주었지요.

1596000037.english: Fufu, good. Then, everyone, carry out the operation with all you've got, as we were briefed!
1596000037.korean: 후후, 좋아. 그렇다면 제군들, 미리 전달받았던 대로 최선을 다해 작전에 임해주어라!

1596000039.english: It's been a while... this lab.

1596000040.english: Master, did they not close this place off separately...?
1596000040.korean: 주인님이 이곳은 따로… 폐쇄를 안 시킨걸까…

1596000041.english: ...Huh? I didn't know there was something like this here.&nThey definitely took all their luggage with them, but...
1596000041.korean: …응? 이곳에 이런 게 있었어?&n짐은 분명 다 가지고 나갔을 텐데...

1596000044.english: The researchers specifically requested these clothes for PECS.&nI received this as a birthday present, but I completely forgot to try it on...
1596000044.korean: 연구원 분들이 특별히 PECS쪽에 요청해서 만든 옷이야.&n생일 선물로 받았는데… 입어 본다는 걸 깜빡 잊고 있었네…

1596000045.english: I'm really jealous... I'd be happy if I had a pretty outfit like that too.&nWhy did you keep it and not wear it all this time?
1596000045.korean: 진짜 부럽다... 나도 그런 예쁜 옷 한 벌 있으면 소원이 없겠다.&n왜 여태 안 입고 묵혀놨던 거야?

1596000046.english: We're barely managing to stop Delta's forces right now, so where would I find time to try something like this on?&nSometimes I think you really live a carefree life...?"
1596000046.korean: 당장 델타의 병력을 막는데도 급급한데 이런 걸 입어볼 시간이 어디 있어?&n가끔 보면 넌 참 속 편하게 산다니까...?

1596000047.english: No, I just thought it would suit you well.
1596000047.korean: 아니 난… 그냥 언니랑 잘 어울릴 것 같아서.

1596000048.english: Honestly, you want this, don't you?
1596000048.korean: 솔직히 말해, 너 이거 탐나는 거지?

1596000049.english: Who's saying they want it? I'm so dumbfounded, really!
1596000049.korean: 타, 탐나긴 누가 탐난다고 그래? 어이가 없어서 진짜~

1596000050.english: You're not being honest, are you? Well, our body types are similar, so it would probably fit you perfectly too.
1596000050.korean: 솔직하지 못 하긴~ 하긴 뭐, 너랑 나랑 체형은 비슷하니까… 네게도 딱 맞게 어울릴 거야.

1596000053.english: What? When did you bring this into my room? After all that nagging...
1596000053.korean: 뭐야. 이건 또 언제 내 방에 가져다 놨어? 잔소리할 땐 언제고...

1596000058.english: - If you're reading this letter, I might have gone down a path I can't return from.
1596000058.korean: - 아마 네가 이 편지를 읽고 있다면, 난 돌아오지 못할 길을 갔을지도 몰라.

1596000060.english: - I was planning to wear it someday to celebrate the day when things get better, but...&nConsidering the situation, it seems difficult after all...
1596000060.korean: - 언젠가 상황이 나아지게 된다면 그 날을 기념하기 위해 입으려 했는데, &n상황으로 볼 때 아무래도 힘들 것 같고…

1596000061.english: - I really wanted to give my reliable younger brother Alcyone, who always took the lead and played an active role, a gift of some kind, no matter what it was.
1596000061.korean: - 늘 앞장 서서 활약했던 믿음직한 동생 알키오네에게 뭐라도 좋으니 선물을 꼭 해주고 싶었어.

1596000062.english: - I remembered you liked this outfit...&nIt feels a bit awkward to take credit when I didn't even prepare it myself.
1596000062.korean: - 네가 이 옷을 마음에 들어 했던 게 떠올라서… &n내가 직접 준비한 것도 아닌데 괜히 생색내는 것 같아서 멋쩍네.

1596000063.english: - Actually, I even told the researchers that I wanted a prettier outfit than this as a gift...&nThe conditions weren't right, and time just passed, so I couldn't keep it...
1596000063.korean: - 실은 이것 보다 더 예쁜 옷을 선물해 달라고 연구원님들께 말도 했었는데…&n여건도 안 되고 이래저래 시간이 지나다 못 지키게 됐네…

1596000065.english: - Even if you came back alive, I was going to give it to you anyway, so don't feel pressured and just wear it.&nSince you've been listening to my nagging all this time, this is a special outfit just for you.
1596000065.korean: - 살아 돌아와도 내가 너한테 줄 거였으니까, 부담 갖지 말고 입어.&n그간 언니 잔소리 잘 들어준 만큼, 특별히 주는 옷이니까.

1596000067.english: - And just in case... Even if something happens to me, I hope you can face it calmly without me.&nIt's really embarrassing to say this, but... I really love you so much, my brightest star... Alcyone.
1596000067.korean: - 그리고 아주 만약... 내가 잘못되더라도, 나 없이 담담하게 해쳐 나가면 좋겠어.&n이런 말 정말 낯뜨겁긴 하지만… 정말 많이 사랑해, 가장 빛나는 별... 알키오네.

1596000069.english: Fool...! You thought I'd be happy just because you left me a single piece of clothing like this?!
1596000069.korean: 바보…! 고작 이런 옷 한 벌 남겨줬다고 해서 내가 좋아할 줄 알았어?!

1596000070.english: I know my older sister looks much better in it than I do!
1596000070.korean: 나보다 언니가 훨씬 더 잘 어울리는 거 뻔히 아는데!

1596000075.english: I was wondering where you went, and here you are. This is where you and your sisters and the researchers were, right?
1596000075.korean: 어디 갔나 했더니 여기 있었구나. 여기가 네 자매들과 연구원이 있던 곳이지?

1596000076.english: Yeah... I came because I wanted to stop by after a while.

1596000077.english: What's that in your hand? It looks like a slightly old piece of clothing.
1596000077.korean: 손에 있는 건 뭐지? 조금 낡은 옷 같은데.

1596000078.english: Oh, this? Hehe... These are the clothes Sister Electra left for me.&nThe color has faded a bit, and since it was in a place that wasn't very well cared for... the fabric has deteriorated quite a bit compared to when I first saw it.
1596000078.korean: 아, 이거? 헤헤… 엘렉트라 언니가 나한테 남겨준 옷이야.&n빛도 좀 바래고, 워낙 관리가 안 되던 곳에 있어서 그런가… 처음 봤을 때 보다 옷감이 많이 상해 버렸네.

1596000079.english: Hmm... that's a shame. It's a pretty dress, so if I wear it on a date, the admiral will probably like it...
1596000079.korean: 으음… 아쉽겠구나. 예쁜 옷이라 데이트 때 입고 나가면 제독이 좋아할 것 같은데…

1596000080.english: Hehe... I think I'll have to ask Audrey to fix it when I get back.
1596000080.korean: 헤헤… 돌아가면 오드리한테 수선 맡겨야 할 것 같아.

1596000081.english: Hmm, Alcyone. I may not be as perfect as Audrey…  &nbut when I was wandering the sea for a long time, I once tailored clothes for the Minister of Finance and the Chief of Staff.
1596000081.korean: 흐음, 알키오네. 내가 오드리처럼 완벽하진 않지만… &n한참 바다를 떠돌던 때, 재정부 장관과 참모총장의 옷을 수선해줬을 때가 있었지.

1596000082.english: If you don't mind, how about letting me take care of the repairs? Of course... I can't do it as perfectly as Audrey, but...&nStill, it's my first date with the admiral, wouldn't it be better to wear something meaningful?
1596000082.korean: 괜찮다면 내게 수선을 맡겨보는 건 어떻겠나? 물론... 오드리보다 완벽히 해주진 못하겠지만.&n그래도 제독과의 첫 데이트인데 뜻깊은 옷을 입고 가는 것이 좋지 않겠나?

1596000083.english: I feel like I'm just causing trouble all the time. Princess Mel. Hehe... Could I ask you a favor?
1596000083.korean: 계속 폐만 끼치는 것 같네. 멜 공주. 헤헤… 부탁해도 될까?

1596000084.english: Okay, leave it to me. I'll stay up all night if I have to, and cut it as cleanly as if it were brand new!
1596000084.korean: 좋아, 맡겨주거라. 밤을 새서라도, 새 옷과 다름없이 깨끗하게 재단해줄 테니!

1596000085.english: A Satgat? What are you doing here alone?

1596000086.english: Just in case, don't go around alone—why not go with Shade?
1596000086.korean: 혹시 모르니 혼자 다니지 말고 쉐이드랑 함께 다니지 그래?

1596000088.english: It's hard to understand, isn't it?

1597000002.english: - Today is the day we're going to Orca Park with Alcyone. I fan myself with my hand in the slightly muggy sunlight, waiting for her.&nNot long after, Alcyone came running from afar with a bright smile.
1597000002.korean: - 오늘은 알키오네와 함께 오르카 파크에 가는 날, 조금은 후덥지근한 햇볕에 손부채질을 하며 그녀를 기다린다.&n얼마 지나지 않아, 멀리서 알키오네가 해맑은 미소로 뛰어왔다.

1597000004.english: - Alcyone's tail wraps around my waist, just like that.&nEntering Orca Park, feeling her sweet scent, but...
1597000004.korean: - 알키오네의 꼬리가 꼭, 내 허리를 휘감는다. &n그녀의 달콤한 체취를 느끼며 오르카 파크에 입장했지만...

1597000005.english: - Due to Alcyone's large size and tail, there weren't many rides she could go on with me...
1597000005.korean: - 알키오네의 큰 체격과, 꼬리 때문에 그녀와 함께 탈 수 있는 놀이기구는 많지 않았다...

1597000006.english: - Of course, Alcyone said it would be fine if we just held hands and walked around Orca Park...&nWhile looking for rides we could enjoy together, one attraction caught my eye.
1597000006.korean: - 물론 알키오네는 그저 나와 손만 잡고 오르카 파크를 거니는 것도 좋다 말했지만…&n그녀와 함께 즐길 수 있는 놀이기구가 있지 않을까 물색하던 중, 어트랙션 하나가 눈에 띄었다.

1597000007.english: - Come to think of it, Melite did say I should definitely visit this attraction once...&nThey say it's a famous haunted house even among the crew members, so maybe Alcyone could enjoy it without any problems too?"
1597000007.korean: - 그러고보니, 멜리테가 꼭 한 번 이 어트랙션에 들리라 말했었지…&n대원들 사이에서도 유명한 유령의 집이라고 하는데, 알키오네도 무리 없이 즐길 수 있지 않을까?

1597000010.english: No! Scared? What are you talking about! I'm a bodyguard protecting my master... Why would I be scared?! Haha~
1597000010.korean: 아냐! 무, 무섭긴 무슨! 난 주인님을 지키는 보디가드인데… 무섭긴 뭘?! 하하~

1597000011.english: - As I entered with Alcyone, who had a confident expression,&nEerie holograms unfolded along with the somber song.
1597000011.korean: - 자신만만한 표정의 알키오네와 함께 안으로 들어가자, &n음산한 노래와 함께 기괴한 홀로그램들이 펼쳐졌다.

1597000013.english: - Alcyone's face was already pale, and she was clinging tightly to me with her tail and arms.
1597000013.korean: - 알키오네는 벌써부터 얼굴이 새파랗게 질린 채, 꼬리와 두 팔로 나를 꼭 끌어안았다.

1597000014.english: - ... It was a strange experience, feeling both suffocated and cushioned at the same time.

1597000015.english: ...Huu... Master, I'm, I'm scared... That, that sound... Aaaaaah!
1597000015.korean: …후으… 주인님, 나 무, 무서워… 저, 저 소리는… 꺄아아아아!

1597000016.english: Fufu, good… Alcyone and Admiral are having a good time together. &nYou're making memories we'll never forget! Both of you are ready, right?
1597000016.korean: 후후, 좋아… 알키오네와 제독이 좋은 시간을 보내고 있구나.&n우리가 잊지 못할 추억들을 만들어주는 거다! 둘 모두 준비 되었겠지?

1597000018.english: Senior... there are no ghosts in the world. Calm down...

1597000022.english: Senior, that was Alcyone's scream just now.

1597000023.english: I'm sorry... I don't think I can do this anymore... It's too scary here...&nToday, I was planning to cosplay as Magical Momo with you, but...
1597000023.korean: 미안하다… 아무래도… 더는 못할 것 같아… 여긴 너무, 무섭다…&n오늘은 너랑 매지컬 모모 코스프레를 할 생각이었는데…

1597000024.english: Senior... we just need to get through this one time. Let's get our strength back quickly.
1597000024.korean: 선배… 이번 한 번만 끝내면 된다. 어서 기운 차리자.

1597000025.english: Okay, the commander and Alcyone are coming here.&nIt's a Poltergeist horror spot, so we can really shine.
1597000025.korean: 좋다, 사령관과 알키오네가 이곳으로 온다.&n마침 폴터가이스트 공포 스팟이라 우리가 맹활약 할 수 있다.

1597000026.english: Ugh... ugh... okay. Wraith... I'm sorry for making a fool of myself.
1597000026.korean: 우으… 으으… 알겠어. 레이스… 추태를 부려서 미안해.

1597000027.english: ...Heh heh, it's nice to see Phantom-senpai's true self sometimes.&nTo show me that precious side of you, the one I only saw when I spent hot nights with the commander...
1597000027.korean: …후후, 가끔 팬텀 선배의 진짜 모습을 볼 때마다 좋다.&n사령관과 뜨거운 밤을 보낼 때만 보이던 귀한 모습을 보여주다니…

1597000028.english: Hmm, ahem… l-let's finish quickly… Wraith.
1597000028.korean: 흐음, 읏흠… 빠, 빨리 끝내자… 레이스.

1597000029.english: Aaaaaah! Master... th, things are flying around!&nHuuuuuaaaang... It's not even a hologram... Ghosts, real ghosts exist! Hmph... sniff...
1597000029.korean: 꺄아아아아악! 주인님… 무, 물건이 날아다니고 있어! &n흐아아아앙… 홀로그램도 아니야… 귀신, 진짜 귀신이 있는 거라고! 흐읍… 흐윽…

1597000030.english: - If it's not a hologram, but actual objects flying around... I think I know whose prank it might be...
1597000030.korean: - 홀로그램이 아니라 실제 물건들이 날아다니는 거면… 누구의 장난일지 알 것도 같은데...

1597000031.english: We are the real ghosts of the mansion. You dare to set foot in our territory? Do you want to die?
1597000031.korean: 우리는 맨션의 진짜 귀신들이다. 가, 감히 우리의 영역에 발을 들이다니 죽고 싶은 것이냐.

1597000032.english: (Senior, your acting was good. Don't be scared, let's keep going.
1597000032.korean: (선배, 연기가 좋았다. 겁먹지 말고 계속 하자.)

1597000033.english: (Thanks, Wraith... I'll work hard this time...)

1597000034.english: - Could the crew be planning a special event...?&nI have no idea why they're trying to scare Alcyone, but let's just pretend we don't know... After all, it probably isn't with bad intentions..."
1597000034.korean: - 설마 대원들이 스페셜 이벤트라도 꾸미는 건가…?&n왜 하필 알키오네를 겁주려고 하는지 감이 오질 않지만, 모른척해 주자… 어쨌거나 나쁜 의도는 아닐 테니…

1597000037.english: Get out of here right now...

1597000039.english: - ...Surely they didn't intend for this to happen.
1597000039.korean: - …설마 이런 걸 의도한 건 아닐 거야.

1597000043.english: - Because their acting was superb, Alcyone, who was in a state of utter panic, mercilessly swung her tail, and each time, the hologram machines were crushed like pancakes.
1597000043.korean: - 둘의 연기가 일품이었던 연유로 혼비백산이 된 알키오네가 사정 없이 꼬리를 휘두를 때마다 홀로그램 기계들은 빈대떡처럼 처참히 짓뭉개졌다.

1597000044.english: - The thought of Alpha sighing heavily when she receives the repair bill later made me shudder in a different way, but...&n...For now, I thought I should soothe our surprised princess.
1597000044.korean: - 나중에 수리 청구서를 받을 알파가 한숨을 푹푹 쉬어댈 상상에 나 또한 다른 의미로 섬뜩해졌지만…&n…일단 지금은 깜짝 놀란 우리 공주님을 잘 다독여줘야 할 것 같았다.

1597000046.english: Still, I'm proud. You scared Mr. Alcyone?
1597000046.korean: 그래도 뿌듯해. 알키오네 씨를 겁먹게 했다니…

1597000047.english: Good job, senior! Let's go to a cafe to celebrate and get a macchiato with lots of syrup.
1597000047.korean: 잘했다 선배! 기념으로 카페에 가서 시럽 가득 마끼야또를 사먹자.

1597000048.english: - It's great that the Orca crew planned to entertain Alcyone even a little bit, but...&nAs I looked at the half-destroyed attraction, I began to pray that the surprise event was over by this point.
1597000048.korean: - 오르카 대원들이 조금이라도 알키오네를 즐겁게 해주려는 계획을 세운 것 까진 좋은데…&n나는 반파된 어트랙션을 보며, 이쯤에서 깜짝 이벤트가 끝났길 기도하기 시작했다.

1597000050.english: - The Grim Reaper, holding a scythe, suddenly appeared before us.&nI seem to remember seeing it briefly in the Orca AGS body storage... Is it just my imagination?
1597000050.korean: - 낫을 든 사신이 별안간 우리 앞에 모습을 드러냈다.&n오르카 AGS 소체 수장고에서 얼핏 본 기억이 있는 것 같은데... 기분 탓인가?

1597000052.english: (Don't worry, Commander. Please look forward to my performance, honed by Goltharion's special training in acting.
1597000052.korean: (걱정마십시오, 사령관. 골타리온의 연기 특훈으로 다져진 저의 활약을 기대해주십시오.)

1597000053.english: It's a real ghost, Master... I'm scared...!

1597000054.english: [C][FF0000]Resistance is futile, the time has come, face your master and death...![/C]
1597000054.korean: [C][FF0000]어떤 저항도 소용없다, 때가 도래했고 네 주인과 죽음을 맞이하거라…![-][/C]

1597000056.english: [C][FF0000]Hahahaha! Seeing your master's eyes filled with terror too...&nYou look like a pathetic loser in the face of death! [-][/C]
1597000056.korean: [C][FF0000]하하하하! 네 주인도 공포에 질린 눈을 하는 걸 보니... &n죽음 앞에선 하찮은 패배자같구나! [-][/C]

1597000057.english: Loser...? Take that back! Don't insult my master!
1597000057.korean: 패배자…? 그 말 취소해! 내 주인님을 모욕하지 마!

1597000059.english: Cursing Master is the same as cursing me!
1597000059.korean: 주인님을 욕하는 건 나를 욕하는 거나 마찬가지야!

1597000062.english: [C][FF0000]Kuhahaha...! A frail orca facing death... ! That courage is admirable...!
1597000062.korean: [C][FF0000]크하하하하하...! 죽음 앞에 맞서는 가녀린 범고래여…! 그 용기가 가상하군…![-][/C]

1597000063.english: (Goltharion said that the best acting is method acting. Please watch over me, Commander.
1597000063.korean: (골타리온이 말하길, 연기의 최고는 메소드 연기라 했습니다. 절 지켜봐 주십시오, 사령관님.)

1597000064.english: - A deafening roar, incomparable to the one before, was heard, and Alcyone and Shade collided.
1597000064.korean: - 아까와는 비교도 할 수 없는 굉음이 들렸고 알키오네와 쉐이드는 격돌했다.

1597000065.english: - The Guardian series are also bodyguard androids whose instincts to protect their masters are enhanced, similar to the Companions...&nHowever, being a creature created based on the genes of large mammals, its destructive power was truly terrifying.
1597000065.korean: - 가디언 시리즈도 컴패니언와 같이 주인을 보호하기 위한 본능이 강화된 경호 바이오로이드…&n하지만 대형 포유류의 유전자를 기반으로 만든 개체인 만큼 그 파괴력은 가히 무시무시했다.

1597000066.english: Get out of here, you evil ghost!

1597000067.english: [C][FF0000]Thrilling! Now that I have overcome death, grant me eternal rest...! [-][/C]
1597000067.korean: [C][FF0000]전율하는군! 죽음을 극복한 내게 영원한 안식을 선물해보거라…! [-][/C]

1597000069.english: Admiral, I am ashamed. Even I didn't expect this kind of development...
1597000069.korean: 제독, 면목이 없다. 이런 건 나 또한 예상치 못한 전개였어…

1597000073.english: - Melite and I had to wait until the fight between Alcyone and Shade subsided.
1597000073.korean: - 나와 멜리테는 알키오네와 쉐이드의 싸움이 소강상태에 이를 때까지 기다려야만 했다.

1597000075.english: Alcyone, do you want to go over there for a bit?

1597000077.english: There's no height restriction either, so it should be fine...
1597000077.korean: 신장 제한도 없어서 괜찮을 것 같은데…

1597000080.english: Cough... air, breath?! Are you suffocating?!

1597000081.english: (I can tell who it is just by their voice...)

1597000083.english: Yes, good girl, there are no ghosts, Alcyone...

1597000086.english: (Um, it's great that you're doing a surprise event, but...)
1597000086.korean: (그, 서프라이즈 이벤트를 해주는 건 좋은데 말이야...)

1597000089.english: Wait a moment, Alcyone. This is just a surprise event...
1597000089.korean: 잠깐 알키오네. 이건 그냥 깜짝 이벤트…

1597000093.english: (You don't need to act so dramatically!)

1597000096.english: Alpha seems like they're going to scold me a lot.
1597000096.korean: 알파가 나 많이 혼낼 거 같은데.

1598000002.english: - Ultimately, the battle between the two could only be stopped after the attractions at Orca Park were completely destroyed.&nFinally, leaving Orca Park, which had closed early, Alcyone and I went to a beach in Malta and sat down.
1598000002.korean: - 결국 오르카 파크의 어트랙션이 완파된 후에야 둘의 전투는 멈출 수 있었다.&n결국 조기 영업 종료가 된 오르카 파크를 뒤로 하고, 나와 알키오네는 몰타의 해변으로 가 앉았다.

1598000003.english: ...Even when I was here, I'd be the first to cry during a courage test with my sisters.
1598000003.korean: …여기 있었을 때도 자매들이랑 담력시험 하면 제일 먼저 울어버렸단 말이야.

1598000004.english: - Certainly, unlike the other Guardian members, Alcyone has a cute and pure side.
1598000004.korean: - 확실히, 다른 가디언 대원들과 다르게 알키오네는 귀엽고 순수한 면이 있다.

1598000005.english: Huh? Oh... back in the day, my sisters and I used to swim here, watch the sunset, and look at the night sky.
1598000005.korean: 응? 아… 옛날에 자매들이랑 이곳에서 수영도 하고… 노을도 감상하고, 밤하늘도 보고 그랬거든.

1598000006.english: Even tho it might just seem like an ordinary beach to you, Master, it's a beach filled with special memories for me.
1598000006.korean: 주인님한테 있어선 그냥 평범한 해변 같아도, 내겐 특별한 추억이 가득 깃든 해변이야.

1598000007.english: ...Every time I close my eyes, I hear laughter along with the sound of the waves.&nThe sound of the fish flapping, and... and...
1598000007.korean: …눈 감을 때마다 파도 소리와 함께 웃음소리가 들려.&n물고기 파닥거리는 소리도, 그리고… 그리고…

1598000008.english: - Alcyone couldn't continue speaking.&nFrom afar, the sea water seemed to beckon and tempt her.
1598000008.korean: - 알키오네는 더 말을 잇지 못했다. &n먼 발치에서부터 바닷물이 손짓하며 그녀를 유혹하는 것만 같았다.

1598000009.english: - Like the lapping waves, a faint smile curves Alcyone's lips.
1598000009.korean: - 찰방거리는 파도처럼 알키오네의 입꼬리에도 희미한 호가 그려진다.

1598000010.english: Master. Thank you... for not closing down the research institute where I used to live.
1598000010.korean: 주인님. 고마워… 내가 살던 연구소, 폐쇄해주지 않아서.

1598000011.english: ...Hehe, you know what? I... I went inside and found the gift that my sister Electra had left for me.
1598000011.korean: …헤헤, 있잖아 나. 안에 들어갔다가, 엘렉트라 언니가 남겨준 선물을 발견했어.

1598000012.english: Yeah, it was originally a gift from the researcher humans for Sister Electra to wear...&nIt was so pretty, I really wanted it... I even wanted to try it on once..."
1598000012.korean: 응, 원래는 연구원 인간 님들이 엘렉트라 언니한테 입으라고 선물해준 옷이었는데…&n너무 예뻐서 내가 많이 탐냈었거든… 한 번 입어보고도 싶었고…

1598000013.english: My sister remembered that and left it for me... she left it behind.&nSeeing it was in bad shape, Melite even offered to fix it herself.
1598000013.korean: 언니가 그걸 기억해두었다가 나한테… 남겨주고 갔더라고.&n상태가 안 좋은 걸 보고는 멜리테가 수선 해 주겠다고 제안까지 먼저 해줬어.

1598000014.english: I'm sorry Melite had to go through so much trouble because of me...&nYou fool... Sister, did you really think I'd jump for joy just because you did this...?
1598000014.korean: 괜히 나 때문에 멜리테만 고생 했네...&n바보… 언니, 이런다고 내가 펄쩍 뛰면서 좋아할 줄 알았나…

1598000015.english: - Once again, Alcyone's eyes began to redden.&nI held her hand tightly and said in a low voice.
1598000015.korean: - 다시금 알키오네의 눈시울이 붉어지기 시작했다.&n나는 그녀의 손을 꼭 잡은 후, 나지막한 목소리로 말했다.

1598000016.english: Huh? You want me to... try it on?

1598000017.english: ...I think it would suit Electra better. That dress... it's yours, isn't it?
1598000017.korean: …엘렉트라 언니가 더 잘 어울릴 거 같은데. 그 옷… 언니 거잖아.

1598000019.english: Really... do you think so? Can I... wear it?

1598000020.english: - As I gently stroked Alcyone's head, she hesitated and then quickly stood up.
1598000020.korean: - 알키오네의 머리를 부드럽게 쓸어내려주자, 그녀는 머뭇거리더니 이내 일어섰다.

1598000021.english: Okay... I'll put it on and come...

1598000022.english: - She walked across the white sandy beach.&nSoon after, Alcyone's voice was heard again.
1598000022.korean: - 그녀는 백사장을 가로지르며 걸어갔다.&n이윽고 얼마 지나지 않아, 다시 알키오네의 목소리가 들려왔다.

1598000024.english: - Lightly splashing the seawater, Alcyone is leaping.
1598000024.korean: - 가볍게 바닷물을 튀기며 알키오네는 뛰어오고 있다.

1598000025.english: - Unlike how she usually looks in her harness, shirt, and waterproof pants,&nAlcyone, dressed in a pure white dress and a straw hat, was beautiful.
1598000025.korean: - 평소의 하네스와 셔츠, 방수 바지를 입은 모습과 다르게 &n순백의 하얀 원피스와 밀짚모자를 쓴 알키오네의 모습은 아름다웠다.

1598000026.english: - If stars appeared in the middle of the day... would it look like this...?
1598000026.korean: - 한낮에 별이 떴다면… 이런 모습이 아닐까…?

1598000027.english: Master! Um... the fit? It's just big... doesn't really suit me, does it?
1598000027.korean: 주인님! 어… 때? 덩치만 크고… 별로 안 어울리지?

1598000028.english: Aww... Master, aren't you overdoing the praise a bit...? It's embarrassing.
1598000028.korean: 에이… 주인님, 칭찬이 너무 과한 거 아냐…? 부끄럽잖아.

1598000029.english: - Alcyone's tail lightly slaps my butt.&nI also felt playful and suddenly lifted her up.
1598000029.korean: - 알키오네의 꼬리가 내 엉덩이를 가볍게 찰싹인다.&n나도 장난기가 발동해 번쩍 그녀를 들어 올렸다.

1598000031.english: - And then, slowly, I stepped into the water. My clothes were getting wet, but… I wanted to make her as happy as possible.
1598000031.korean: - 그리고 천천히, 바다 안으로 들어갔다. &n옷이 젖어가고 있었지만… 최대한 그녀를 즐겁게 해주고 싶었다.

1598000032.english: - After being momentarily flustered... After entering the deep sea area and releasing Alcyone,&nShe paddles forward with all her might.
1598000032.korean: - 잠시 당황스러워 하는 것도 잠시... 깊은 해역까지 들어 온 후 알키오네를 내려놔 주자,&n그녀는 힘껏 물장구를 치며 앞으로 나아간다.

1598000033.english: - Alcyone's dress also got wet, but it made her look more like a mermaid gracefully fluttering her fins.&nAlcyone, who had been swimming freely, soon returned to me and embraced me.
1598000033.korean: - 알키오네의 원피스도 물에 젖었지만, 그 모습은 오히려 지느러미를 우아하게 팔랑거리는 인어처럼 보이게 만들었다.&n자유롭게 헤엄치던 알키오네는 이내 다시 내 앞으로 돌아온 후, 나를 끌어안았다.

1598000035.english: It's okay! Just trust me and lean on me!

1598000036.english: - Alcyone, with one arm around me, begins to swim with a relaxed and skillful stroke.&nMy feet didn't touch the ground, but... perhaps because of Alcyone's soft embrace, I wasn't nervous even in the fairly deep water.
1598000036.korean: - 알키오네는 한 팔로 나를 끌어안은 채 여유롭고 능숙한 헤엄을 치기 시작한다.&n발이 땅에 닿지 않았지만… 알키오네의 푹신한 품 때문일까, 제법 깊은 수심에도 불안하지 않았다.

1598000037.english: - Finally, Alcyone meets my gaze and smiles faintly.
1598000037.korean: - 이윽고 알키오네는 눈을 마주보고 씽긋 웃는다.

1598000039.english: ...And thank you to the Orca crew as well.

1598000040.english: It's a personal matter, but... you're taking so much care and trying to comfort me like this... I'm really... really...
1598000040.korean: 개인적인 문제인데… 이렇게 신경 써주고, 달래주려 해서… 정말… 정말…

1598000044.english: Master, it's me. I thought I'd forgotten, but... I still keep thinking about my older sisters.
1598000044.korean: 주인님, 나 말이야. 잊었다고 생각했는데… 아직 언니들이 계속 밟혀.​

1598000045.english: - Did Alcyone imagine spending time here with her sisters, now that it was peaceful again...?
1598000045.korean: - 알키오네는 자매들과 함께 다시 평화로워진 이곳에서 시간을 보내는 상상을 했던 걸까…?

1598000046.english: I wish my older sisters had come here too...

1598000047.english: If all the sisters had been together, we could have made even more fun memories...
1598000047.korean: 자매들이 모두 모여, 더 즐거운 추억 만들 수 있었을 텐데...

1598000048.english: If I only think about it that way, a part of my heart feels strange... I vowed not to dwell on the past anymore, but...
1598000048.korean: 그렇게만 생각하면 마음 한 켠이 이상해... 이젠 옛날 생각하지 않을 거라 다짐했는데...​

1598000049.english: - It seems Alcyone will need more time than I thought...
1598000049.korean: - 생각보다 알키오네에게는 더 많은 시간이 필요하겠구나…

1598000050.english: But I can't stay immersed in sadness like this forever...
1598000050.korean: 하지만 언제까지고 이렇게 슬픔에 젖어 있을 순 없겠지... ​
